TEXT.English: Aquatic Anti-Air Defense are forts for anti-aircraft defense. These were larger installations comprising seven interconnected steel platforms, six carried guns arranged in a semicircle around the control center and accommodation while the seventh, set further out than the gun towers, was the searchlight tower.
TEXT.French: La D茅fense Anti-A茅rienne Aquatique consiste en des forts anti-a茅riens. Ce sont de grandes installations compos茅es de sept plates-formes en acier interconnect茅es, six 茅quip茅es de canons dispos茅s en demi-cercle autour du centre de contr么le et des logements, tandis que la septi猫me, situ茅e plus loin que les tours de canons, est la tour 脿 projecteur.
TEXT.Russian: 袙芯写薪邪褟 斜邪褌邪褉械褟 袩袙袨 锌褉械写褋褌邪胁谢褟械褌 褋芯斜芯泄 屑芯褉褋泻懈械 褎芯褉褌褘 锌褉芯褌懈胁芯胁芯蟹写褍褕薪芯泄 芯斜芯褉芯薪褘. 协褌芯 斜褘谢懈 斜芯谢械械 泻褉褍锌薪褘械 褍褋褌邪薪芯胁泻懈, 褋芯褋褌芯褟褖懈械 懈蟹 褋械屑懈 褋芯械写懈薪械薪薪褘褏 屑械卸写褍 褋芯斜芯泄 褋褌邪谢褜薪褘褏 锌谢邪褌褎芯褉屑, 褕械褋褌褜 懈蟹 泻芯褌芯褉褘褏 薪械褋褍褌 芯褉褍写懈褟, 褉邪褋锌芯谢芯卸械薪薪褘械 锌芯谢褍泻褉褍谐芯屑 胁芯泻褉褍谐 褑械薪褌褉邪 褍锌褉邪胁谢械薪懈褟 懈 卸懈谢褘褏 锌芯屑械褖械薪懈泄, 邪 褋械写褜屑邪褟, 褉邪褋锌芯谢芯卸械薪薪邪褟 写邪谢褜褕械, 褔械屑 邪褉褌懈谢谢械褉懈泄褋泻懈械 斜邪褕薪懈, 斜褘谢邪 锌褉芯卸械泻褌芯褉薪芯泄 胁褘褕泻芯泄.
脤卯冒帽锚卯茅 霉猫貌

TEXT.English: Aquatic Force Field, a sea barrier made up of energy or particles to protect a person, area or object from attacks or intrusions or as a means of containment or confinement. Sometimes known as an energy shield, force shield, or deflector shield, is a barrier made of energy or particles. It protects a person, area, or object from attacks or intrusions. This technology is created as a field of energy without mass that acts as a wall, so that objects affected by the particular force relating to the field are unable to pass through the field and reach the other side.
TEXT.Russian: 袙芯写薪芯械 褋懈谢芯胁芯械 锌芯谢械, 屑芯褉褋泻芯泄 褖懈褌, 褋芯褋褌芯褟褖懈泄 懈蟹 褝薪械褉谐懈懈 懈谢懈 褔邪褋褌懈褑, 写谢褟 蟹邪褖懈褌褘 褔械谢芯胁械泻邪, 褌械褉褉懈褌芯褉懈懈 懈谢懈 芯斜褗械泻褌邪 芯褌 邪褌邪泻 懈谢懈 胁褌芯褉卸械薪懈泄 懈谢懈 泻邪泻 褋褉械写褋褌胁芯 褋写械褉卸懈胁邪薪懈褟 懈谢懈 芯谐褉邪薪懈褔械薪懈褟. 袠薪芯谐写邪 懈蟹胁械褋褌薪褘泄 泻邪泻 褝薪械褉谐械褌懈褔械褋泻懈泄 褖懈褌, 褋懈谢芯胁芯泄 褖懈褌 懈谢懈 写械褎谢械泻褌芯褉薪褘泄 褖懈褌, 锌褉械写褋褌邪胁谢褟械褌 褋芯斜芯泄 斜邪褉褜械褉, 褋芯褋褌芯褟褖懈泄 懈蟹 褝薪械褉谐懈懈 懈谢懈 褔邪褋褌懈褑. 袨薪 蟹邪褖懈褖邪械褌 褋褍写邪, 褌械褉褉懈褌芯褉懈褞 懈谢懈 芯斜褗械泻褌 芯褌 邪褌邪泻 懈谢懈 胁褌芯褉卸械薪懈泄. 协褌邪 褌械褏薪芯谢芯谐懈褟 褋芯蟹写邪械褌褋褟 泻邪泻 锌芯谢械 褝薪械褉谐懈懈 斜械蟹 屑邪褋褋褘, 泻芯褌芯褉芯械 写械泄褋褌胁褍械褌 泻邪泻 褋褌械薪邪, 褌邪泻 褔褌芯 芯斜褗械泻褌褘, 薪邪 泻芯褌芯褉褘械 写械泄褋褌胁褍械褌 芯锌褉械写械谢械薪薪邪褟 褋懈谢邪, 芯褌薪芯褋褟褖邪褟褋褟 泻 锌芯谢褞, 薪械 屑芯谐褍褌 锌褉芯泄褌懈 褔械褉械蟹 锌芯谢械 懈 写芯褋褌懈褔褜 写褉褍谐芯泄 褋褌芯褉芯薪褘.
脣脿茫氓冒眉 脿冒玫氓卯毛卯茫卯芒

TEXT.Russian: 协褌芯褌 薪械写邪胁薪芯 芯斜薪邪褉褍卸械薪薪褘泄 写褉械胁薪懈泄 褏褉邪屑 褌械锌械褉褜 卸写械褌 褋胁芯械谐芯 懈褋褋谢械写芯胁邪褌械谢褟, 褋泻褉褘胁邪褟 胁 褋械斜械 写褉械胁薪懈械 褉褍泻芯锌懈褋懈, 邪褉褌械褎邪泻褌褘 懈 褋芯泻褉芯胁懈褖邪 写邪胁薪芯 蟹邪斜褘褌芯泄 褑懈胁懈谢懈蟹邪褑懈懈.

TEXT.English: Ruins are the remains of human-made architecture: structures that were once complete, as time went by, have fallen into a state of partial or complete disrepair, due to lack of maintenance or deliberate acts of destruction. Disasters, war and depopulation are the most common root causes, with many structures becoming progressively derelict over time due to long-term weathering and scavenging.
TEXT.French: Les Ruines sont les vestiges d'architectures humaines : des structures autrefois compl猫tes, qui avec le temps sont tomb茅es en d茅su茅tude partielle ou totale, 脿 cause du manque d'entretien ou d'actes d茅lib茅r茅s de destruction. Les catastrophes, guerres et d茅peuplements sont les causes principales, et de nombreuses structures deviennent progressivement d茅labr茅es du fait de l'茅rosion et du pillage 脿 long terme.
TEXT.Polish: Ruina lub ruiny (z ³ac. ruere - przewracaæ siê) - widoczne pozosta³oœci zniszczonego, lecz nieca³kowicie rozebranego obiektu budowlanego. Ruiny powstaj¹ na skutek opuszczenia przez u¿ytkowników budowli lub budynków, których dalsze u¿ytkowanie nie jest mo¿liwe lub op³acalne. Proces przekszta³cania obiektu w ruinê mo¿e byæ równie¿ zainicjowany przez zniszczenia wojenne czy katastrofy naturalne. Dalsze niszczenie nastêpuje np. poprzez wp³yw warunków atmosferycznych lub pozyskiwanie elementów budowlanych z opuszczonego obiektu (kamieñ, z³om stalowy itp.).
TEXT.Russian: 袪褍懈薪褘 - 褝褌芯 芯褋褌邪褌泻懈 懈褋泻褍褋褋褌胁械薪薪褘褏 褋芯芯褉褍卸械薪懈泄: 写褉械胁薪懈械 邪褉褏懈褌械泻褌褍褉薪褘械 锌邪屑褟褌薪懈泻懈, 锌褉懈褕械写褕懈械 褋芯 胁褉械屑械薪械屑 胁 褋芯褋褌芯褟薪懈械 褔邪褋褌懈褔薪芯谐芯 懈谢懈 锌芯谢薪芯谐芯 蟹邪锌褍褋褌械薪懈褟 懈蟹-蟹邪 芯褌褋褍褌褋褌胁懈褟 褌械褏薪懈褔械褋泻芯谐芯 芯斜褋谢褍卸懈胁邪薪懈褟 懈谢懈 锌褉械写薪邪屑械褉械薪薪芯谐芯 褉邪蟹褉褍褕械薪懈褟. 小褌懈褏懈泄薪褘械 斜械写褋褌胁懈褟, 胁芯泄薪褘 懈 芯斜械蟹谢褞写械薪懈械 屑械褋褌薪芯褋褌懈 褟胁谢褟褞褌褋褟 薪邪懈斜芯谢械械 褉邪褋锌褉芯褋褌褉邪薪械薪薪褘屑懈 锌械褉胁芯锌褉懈褔懈薪邪屑懈. 孝邪泻懈屑 芯斜褉邪蟹芯屑, 屑薪芯谐懈械 褋芯芯褉褍卸械薪懈褟 芯泻邪蟹邪谢懈褋褜 锌芯褋褌械锌械薪薪芯 蟹邪斜褉芯褕械薪褘 懈蟹-蟹邪 写谢懈褌械谢褜薪芯谐芯 胁褘胁械褌褉懈胁邪薪懈褟 懈 褝褉芯蟹懈懈.
脴脿玫貌氓冒帽锚脿每 锚卯毛卯铆猫每

TEXT.English: Colony mining of uninhabited planets and moons is vitally important in New Eden for any manufacturing station that wants to compete on equal footing with stations orbiting inhabited planets. Although such stations do occasionally exist without the support of a mineral rich stellar body, they must then rely on minerals being transported to them, which is always more cumbersome and expensive. This has made uninhabited but mineral-rich planets gold mines - often in the literal sense - for anyone aspiring to large-scale manufacturing.
TEXT.Russian: 袚芯褉薪芯写芯斜褘胁邪褞褖懈械 泻芯谢芯薪懈懈 薪邪 薪械芯斜懈褌邪械屑褘褏 锌谢邪薪械褌邪褏 懈 谢褍薪邪褏 卸懈蟹薪械薪薪芯 胁邪卸薪邪 胁 袧芯胁芯屑 协写械屑械 写谢褟 谢褞斜芯泄 锌褉芯懈蟹胁芯写褋褌胁械薪薪芯泄 褋褌邪薪褑懈懈, 泻芯褌芯褉邪褟 褏芯褔械褌 薪邪 褉邪胁薪褘褏 泻芯薪泻褍褉懈褉芯胁邪褌褜 褋芯 褋褌邪薪褑懈褟屑懈, 胁褉邪褖邪褞褖懈屑懈褋褟 胁芯泻褉褍谐 芯斜懈褌邪械屑褘褏 锌谢邪薪械褌. 啸芯褌褟 褌邪泻懈械 褋褌邪薪褑懈懈 懈薪芯谐写邪 褋褍褖械褋褌胁褍褞褌 斜械蟹 锌芯写写械褉卸泻懈 斜芯谐邪褌芯谐芯 屑懈薪械褉邪谢邪屑懈 蟹胁械蟹写薪芯谐芯 褌械谢邪, 胁 褝褌芯屑 褋谢褍褔邪械 芯薪懈 写芯谢卸薪褘 锌芯谢邪谐邪褌褜褋褟 薪邪 屑懈薪械褉邪谢褘, 泻芯褌芯褉褘械 写芯褋褌邪胁谢褟褞褌褋褟 泻 薪懈屑, 褔褌芯 胁褋械谐写邪 斜芯谢械械 谐褉芯屑芯蟹写泻芯 懈 写芯褉芯谐芯. 协褌芯 褋写械谢邪谢芯 薪械芯斜懈褌邪械屑褘械, 薪芯 斜芯谐邪褌褘械 屑懈薪械褉邪谢邪屑懈 锌谢邪薪械褌褘 蟹芯谢芯褌褘屑懈 锌褉懈懈褋泻邪屑懈 - 褔邪褋褌芯 胁 斜褍泻胁邪谢褜薪芯屑 褋屑褘褋谢械 - 写谢褟 胁褋械褏, 泻褌芯 褋褌褉械屑懈褌褋褟 泻 泻褉褍锌薪芯屑邪褋褕褌邪斜薪芯屑褍 锌褉芯懈蟹胁芯写褋褌胁褍.

TEXT.English: Hydroponics is a subset of hydroculture and is a method of growing plants using mineral nutrient solutions, in water, without soil. Terrestrial plants may be grown with their roots in the mineral nutrient solution only or in an inert medium, such as perlite or gravel. Plants that are not traditionally grown in a climate would be possible to grow using a controlled environment system like hydroponics. NASA has also looked to utilize hydroponics in the space program. Ray Wheeler,a plant physiologist at Kennedy Space Center's Space Life Science Lab, believes that hydroponics will create advances within space travel.
TEXT.Russian: 袚懈写褉芯锌芯薪懈泻邪 - 褝褌芯 褉邪蟹薪芯胁懈写薪芯褋褌褜 谐懈写褉芯泻褍谢褜褌褍褉褘 懈 屑械褌芯写 胁褘褉邪褖懈胁邪薪懈褟 褉邪褋褌械薪懈泄 褋 懈褋锌芯谢褜蟹芯胁邪薪懈械屑 褉邪褋褌胁芯褉芯胁 屑懈薪械褉邪谢褜薪褘褏 锌懈褌邪褌械谢褜薪褘褏 胁械褖械褋褌胁 胁 胁芯写械, 斜械蟹 锌芯褔胁褘. 袧邪蟹械屑薪褘械 褉邪褋褌械薪懈褟 屑芯卸薪芯 胁褘褉邪褖懈胁邪褌褜 褋 泻芯褉薪褟屑懈 褌芯谢褜泻芯 胁 屑懈薪械褉邪谢褜薪芯屑 锌懈褌邪褌械谢褜薪芯屑 褉邪褋褌胁芯褉械 懈谢懈 胁 懈薪械褉褌薪芯泄 褋褉械写械, 褌邪泻芯泄 泻邪泻 锌械褉谢懈褌 懈谢懈 谐褉邪胁懈泄. 袪邪褋褌械薪懈褟, 泻芯褌芯褉褘械 褌褉邪写懈褑懈芯薪薪芯 薪械 胁褘褉邪褖懈胁邪褞褌褋褟 胁 泻谢懈屑邪褌懈褔械褋泻懈褏 褍褋谢芯胁懈褟褏, 屑芯卸薪芯 斜褘谢芯 斜褘 胁褘褉邪褖懈胁邪褌褜 褋 懈褋锌芯谢褜蟹芯胁邪薪懈械屑 褋懈褋褌械屑褘 泻芯薪褌褉芯谢懈褉褍械屑芯泄 褋褉械写褘, 褌邪泻芯泄 泻邪泻 谐懈写褉芯锌芯薪懈泻邪. 袧袗小袗 褌邪泻卸械 褉邪褋褋屑邪褌褉懈胁邪谢芯 胁芯蟹屑芯卸薪芯褋褌褜 懈褋锌芯谢褜蟹芯胁邪薪懈褟 谐懈写褉芯锌芯薪懈泻懈 胁 泻芯褋屑懈褔械褋泻芯泄 锌褉芯谐褉邪屑屑械. 袪褝泄 校懈谢谢械褉, 褎懈蟹懈芯谢芯谐 褉邪褋褌械薪懈泄 懈蟹 谢邪斜芯褉邪褌芯褉懈懈 泻芯褋屑懈褔械褋泻懈褏 薪邪褍泻 芯 卸懈蟹薪懈 袣芯褋屑懈褔械褋泻芯谐芯 褑械薪褌褉邪 袣械薪薪械写懈, 褋褔懈褌邪械褌, 褔褌芯 谐懈写褉芯锌芯薪懈泻邪 锌褉懈胁械写械褌 泻 褍褋锌械褏褍 胁 泻芯褋屑懈褔械褋泻懈褏 锌褍褌械褕械褋褌胁懈褟褏.
脧冒卯矛. 锚卯毛卯铆猫每

TEXT.English: Colony Manufactory, also known as factories, are used to convert one type of planetary resource or product into a different product. The purpose of Planetary industrialisation is to produce things from stuff you have extracted from planets and make money by selling it on the market.
TEXT.French: La Manufacture de Colonie, 茅galement appel茅e usine, sert 脿 convertir un type de ressource ou produit plan茅taire en un autre produit. Le but de l'industrialisation plan茅taire est de produire des biens 脿 partir des mati猫res extraites des plan猫tes et d'en tirer profit 脿 la vente sur le march茅.

TEXT.English: A Command bunker was a defensive military fortification specially outfitted for military commanders. Bunkers are mostly underground, compared to blockhouses which are mostly above ground. They were used extensively in World War I, World War II, and the Cold War for weapons facilities, command and control centers, and storage facilities (for example, in the event of nuclear war).
TEXT.French: Un Bunker de commandement est une fortification militaire sp茅cialement 茅quip茅 pour les commandants militaires. Plac茅s en hauteur, disposant des moyens de communications ad茅quats.

TEXT.English: A command center or command centre (often called a war room) is any place that is used to provide centralized command for some purpose. While frequently considered to be a military facility, these can be used in many other cases by governments or businesses. The term "war room" is also often used in politics to refer to teams of communications people who monitor and listen to the media and the public, respond to inquiries, and synthesize opinions to determine the best course of action.
TEXT.French: Un centre de commandement (souvent appel茅 salle de guerre) est un lieu servant 脿 fournir un commandement centralis茅. Bien qu'il soit souvent militaire, il peut 锚tre utilis茅 dans d'autres cas par des gouvernements ou entreprises. Le terme 搂salle de guerre搂 est aussi employ茅 en politique pour d茅signer des 茅quipes de communication qui surveillent les m茅dias et le public, r茅pondent aux demandes et synth茅tisent les opinions pour d茅terminer la meilleure action.
TEXT.Russian: 袣芯屑邪薪写薪褘泄 褑械薪褌褉 (褔邪褋褌芯 薪邪蟹褘胁邪械屑褘泄 锌芯谢械胁褘屑 褕褌邪斜芯屑) - 褝褌芯 谢褞斜芯械 屑械褋褌芯, 泻芯褌芯褉芯械 懈褋锌芯谢褜蟹褍械褌褋褟 写谢褟 褑械薪褌褉邪谢懈蟹芯胁邪薪薪芯谐芯 褍锌褉邪胁谢械薪懈褟 褋 芯锌褉械写械谢械薪薪芯泄 褑械谢褜褞. 啸芯褌褟 芯薪懈 褔邪褋褌芯 褋褔懈褌邪褞褌褋褟 胁芯械薪薪褘屑懈 芯斜褗械泻褌邪屑懈, 芯薪懈 屑芯谐褍褌 懈褋锌芯谢褜蟹芯胁邪褌褜褋褟 胁芯 屑薪芯谐懈褏 写褉褍谐懈褏 褋谢褍褔邪褟褏 锌褉邪胁懈褌械谢褜褋褌胁邪屑懈 懈谢懈 锌褉械写锌褉懈褟褌懈褟屑懈. 孝械褉屑懈薪 芦褕褌邪斜禄 褌邪泻卸械 褔邪褋褌芯 懈褋锌芯谢褜蟹褍械褌褋褟 胁 锌芯谢懈褌懈泻械 写谢褟 芯斜芯蟹薪邪褔械薪懈褟 谐褉褍锌锌 谢褞写械泄, 蟹邪薪懈屑邪褞褖懈褏褋褟 褋胁褟蟹褟屑懈, 泻芯褌芯褉褘械 褋谢械写褟褌 蟹邪 小袦袠 懈 芯斜褖械褋褌胁械薪薪芯褋褌褜褞 懈 褋谢褍褕邪褞褌 懈褏, 芯褌胁械褔邪褞褌 薪邪 蟹邪锌褉芯褋褘 懈 芯斜芯斜褖邪褞褌 屑薪械薪懈褟, 褔褌芯斜褘 芯锌褉械写械谢懈褌褜 薪邪懈谢褍褔褕懈泄 泻褍褉褋 写械泄褋褌胁懈泄.

TEXT.English: In modern usage, a cottage is usually a modest, often cozy dwelling, typically in a rural or semi-rural location. However there are cottage-style dwellings in cities, and in places such as Canada the term exists with no connotations of size at all (cf. vicarage or hermitage). In the United Kingdom the term cottage also tends to denote rural dwellings of traditional build, although it can also be applied to dwellings of modern construction which are designed to resemble traditional ones ("mock cottages").

TEXT.Russian: 袙 褋芯胁褉械屑械薪薪芯屑 懈褋锌芯谢褜蟹芯胁邪薪懈懈 泻芯褌褌械写卸 芯斜褘褔薪芯 锌褉械写褋褌邪胁谢褟械褌 褋芯斜芯泄 褋泻褉芯屑薪芯械, 褔邪褋褌芯 褍褞褌薪芯械 卸懈谢懈褖械, 芯斜褘褔薪芯 胁 褋械谢褜褋泻芯泄 懈谢懈 锌芯谢褍褋械谢褜褋泻芯泄 屑械褋褌薪芯褋褌懈. 袨写薪邪泻芯 胁 谐芯褉芯写邪褏 械褋褌褜 卸懈谢懈褖邪 胁 褋褌懈谢械 泻芯褌褌械写卸械泄, 邪 胁 褌邪泻懈褏 屑械褋褌邪褏, 泻邪泻 袣邪薪邪写邪, 褝褌芯褌 褌械褉屑懈薪 胁芯芯斜褖械 薪械 懈屑械械褌 泻芯薪薪芯褌邪褑懈懈 褉邪蟹屑械褉邪 (褋褉. 褋胁褟褖械薪薪懈泻 懈谢懈 芯褌褕械谢褜薪懈泻). 袙 小芯械写懈薪械薪薪芯屑 袣芯褉芯谢械胁褋褌胁械 褌械褉屑懈薪 泻芯褌褌械写卸 褌邪泻卸械 懈屑械械褌 褌械薪写械薪褑懈褞 芯斜芯蟹薪邪褔邪褌褜 褋械谢褜褋泻懈械 卸懈谢懈褖邪 褌褉邪写懈褑懈芯薪薪芯泄 锌芯褋褌褉芯泄泻懈, 褏芯褌褟 芯薪 褌邪泻卸械 屑芯卸械褌 锌褉懈屑械薪褟褌褜褋褟 泻 卸懈谢懈褖邪屑 褋芯胁褉械屑械薪薪芯泄 锌芯褋褌褉芯泄泻懈, 泻芯褌芯褉褘械 褋锌褉芯械泻褌懈褉芯胁邪薪褘 褌邪泻, 褔褌芯斜褘 薪邪锌芯屑懈薪邪褌褜 褌褉邪写懈褑懈芯薪薪褘械 (芦懈屑懈褌懈褉褍褞褖懈械 泻芯褌褌械写卸懈禄).

TEXT.English: Deep sea mining is a relatively new mineral retrieval process that takes place on the ocean floor. Ocean mining sites are usually around large areas of polymetallic nodules or active and extinct hydrothermal vents at about 1,400 - 3,700 m below the ocean's surface. The vents create sulfide deposits, which contain valuable metals such as silver, gold, copper, manganese, cobalt, and zinc. The deposits are mined using either hydraulic pumps or bucket systems that take ore to the surface to be processed. As with all mining operations, deep sea mining raises questions about potential environmental impact on surrounding areas. Environmental advocacy groups such as Greenpeace have argued that seabed mining should not be permitted in most of the world's oceans because of the potential for damage to deepsea ecosystems.
TEXT.Russian: 袚谢褍斜芯泻芯胁芯写薪邪褟 写芯斜褘褔邪 锌芯谢械蟹薪褘褏 懈褋泻芯锌邪械屑褘褏 褟胁谢褟械褌褋褟 芯褌薪芯褋懈褌械谢褜薪芯 薪芯胁褘屑 锌褉芯褑械褋褋芯屑 写芯斜褘褔懈 锌芯谢械蟹薪褘褏 懈褋泻芯锌邪械屑褘褏, 泻芯褌芯褉褘泄 锌褉芯懈褋褏芯写懈褌 薪邪 写薪械 芯泻械邪薪邪. 袨泻械邪薪懈褔械褋泻懈械 屑械褋褌芯褉芯卸写械薪懈褟 芯斜褘褔薪芯 褉邪褋锌芯谢芯卸械薪褘 胁芯泻褉褍谐 斜芯谢褜褕懈褏 锌谢芯褖邪写械泄 锌芯谢懈屑械褌邪谢谢懈褔械褋泻懈褏 泻芯薪泻褉械褑懈泄 懈谢懈 邪泻褌懈胁薪褘褏 懈 锌芯褌褍褏褕懈褏 谐懈写褉芯褌械褉屑邪谢褜薪褘褏 卸械褉谢 薪邪 谐谢褍斜懈薪械 锌褉懈屑械褉薪芯 1400 - 3700 屑 薪懈卸械 锌芯胁械褉褏薪芯褋褌懈 芯泻械邪薪邪. 袙 谐械芯谢芯谐懈褔械褋泻懈褏 锌谢邪褋褌邪褏 薪械褉械写泻芯 薪邪褏芯写褟褌褋褟 芯褌谢芯卸械薪懈褟 褋褍谢褜褎懈写芯胁, 褋芯写械褉卸邪褖懈械 胁 褋械斜械 褑械薪薪褘械 屑械褌邪谢谢褘, 褌邪泻懈械 泻邪泻 褋械褉械斜褉芯, 蟹芯谢芯褌芯, 屑械写褜, 屑邪褉谐邪薪械褑, 泻芯斜邪谢褜褌 懈 褑懈薪泻. 袦械褋褌芯褉芯卸写械薪懈褟 褉邪蟹褉邪斜邪褌褘胁邪褞褌褋褟 褋 锌芯屑芯褖褜褞 谐懈写褉邪胁谢懈褔械褋泻懈褏 薪邪褋芯褋芯胁 懈谢懈 泻芯胁褕芯胁褘褏 褋懈褋褌械屑, 泻芯褌芯褉褘械 写芯褋褌邪胁谢褟褞褌 褉褍写褍 薪邪 芯斜褉邪斜邪褌褘胁邪械屑褍褞 锌芯胁械褉褏薪芯褋褌褜. 袣邪泻 懈 胁芯 胁褋械褏 谐芯褉薪褘褏 褉邪斜芯褌邪褏, 谐谢褍斜芯泻芯胁芯写薪邪褟 写芯斜褘褔邪 锌芯写薪懈屑邪械褌 胁芯锌褉芯褋褘 芯 锌芯褌械薪褑懈邪谢褜薪芯屑 胁芯蟹写械泄褋褌胁懈懈 薪邪 芯泻褉褍卸邪褞褖褍褞 褋褉械写褍. 袚褉褍锌锌褘 蟹邪褖懈褌薪懈泻芯胁 芯泻褉褍卸邪褞褖械泄 褋褉械写褘, 褌邪泻懈械 泻邪泻 袚褉懈薪锌懈褋, 褍褌胁械褉卸写邪褞褌, 褔褌芯 写芯斜褘褔邪 褋 屑芯褉褋泻芯谐芯 写薪邪 薪械写芯锌褍褋褌懈屑邪 胁 斜芯谢褜褕懈薪褋褌胁械 屑懈褉芯胁褘褏 芯泻械邪薪芯胁 懈蟹-蟹邪 锌芯褌械薪褑懈邪谢褜薪芯谐芯 褍褖械褉斜邪 写谢褟 谐谢褍斜芯泻芯胁芯写薪褘褏 褝泻芯褋懈褋褌械屑.

TEXT.English: A farm is an area of land, including various structures, devoted primarily to the practice of producing and managing food (produce, grains, or livestock), fibres and, increasingly, fuel. It is the basic production facility in food production. Farms may be owned and operated by a single individual, family, community, corporation or a company. A farm can be a holding of any size from a fraction of a hectare to several thousand hectares.
TEXT.French: Une ferme est une 茅tendue de terrain, avec diverses structures, principalement destin茅e 脿 produire et g茅rer la nourriture (produits, c茅r茅ales ou b茅tail), des fibres et de plus en plus du carburant. C'est l'installation de base en production alimentaire. Les fermes peuvent appartenir 脿 un individu, une famille, une communaut茅, une entreprise ou une soci茅t茅. Elles peuvent avoir toute taille, d'une fraction d'hectare 脿 plusieurs milliers d'hectares.

TEXT.English: A nature reserve (natural reserve, nature preserve, natural preserve) is a protected area of importance for wildlife, flora, fauna or features of geological or other special interest, which is reserved and managed for conservation and to provide special opportunities for study or research. Nature reserves may be designated by government institutions in some countries, or by private landowners, such as charities and research institutions, regardless of nationality. Nature reserves fall into different IUCN categories depending on the level of protection afforded by local laws.

TEXT.Russian: 袟邪锌芯胁械写薪懈泻 - 褝褌芯 芯褏褉邪薪褟械屑邪褟 褌械褉褉懈褌芯褉懈褟, 懈屑械褞褖邪褟 蟹薪邪褔械薪懈械 写谢褟 写懈泻芯泄 锌褉懈褉芯写褘, 褎谢芯褉褘, 褎邪褍薪褘 懈谢懈 谐械芯谢芯谐懈褔械褋泻懈褏 懈谢懈 写褉褍谐懈褏 芯褋芯斜褘褏 懈薪褌械褉械褋芯胁, 泻芯褌芯褉邪褟 蟹邪褉械蟹械褉胁懈褉芯胁邪薪邪 懈 褍锌褉邪胁谢褟械褌褋褟 写谢褟 褋芯褏褉邪薪械薪懈褟 懈 锌褉械写芯褋褌邪胁谢褟械褌 芯褋芯斜褘械 胁芯蟹屑芯卸薪芯褋褌懈 写谢褟 懈蟹褍褔械薪懈褟 懈谢懈 懈褋褋谢械写芯胁邪薪懈泄. 袟邪锌芯胁械写薪懈泻懈 屑芯谐褍褌 斜褘褌褜 褋芯蟹写邪薪褘 谐芯褋褍写邪褉褋褌胁械薪薪褘屑懈 褍褔褉械卸写械薪懈褟屑懈 胁 薪械泻芯褌芯褉褘褏 褋褌褉邪薪邪褏 懈谢懈 褔邪褋褌薪褘屑懈 蟹械屑谢械胁谢邪写械谢褜褑邪屑懈, 谢懈斜芯 褞褉懈写懈褔械褋泻懈屑懈 谢懈褑邪屑懈, 褌邪泻懈屑懈 泻邪泻 斜谢邪谐芯褌胁芯褉懈褌械谢褜薪褘械 芯褉谐邪薪懈蟹邪褑懈懈 懈 懈褋褋谢械写芯胁邪褌械谢褜褋泻懈械 褍褔褉械卸写械薪懈褟, 薪械蟹邪胁懈褋懈屑芯 芯褌 薪邪褑懈芯薪邪谢褜薪芯褋褌懈. 袟邪锌芯胁械写薪懈泻懈 锌芯锌邪写邪褞褌 胁 褉邪蟹谢懈褔薪褘械 泻邪褌械谐芯褉懈懈 袦小袨袩 胁 蟹邪胁懈褋懈屑芯褋褌懈 芯褌 褍褉芯胁薪褟 蟹邪褖懈褌褘, 锌褉械写褍褋屑芯褌褉械薪薪芯谐芯 屑械褋褌薪褘屑 蟹邪泻芯薪芯写邪褌械谢褜褋褌胁芯屑.

TEXT.English: Fortifications are military constructions and buildings designed for defence in warfare and military bases. Humans have constructed defensive works for many thousands of years, in a variety of increasingly complex designs. The term is derived from the Latin fortis ("strong") and facere ("to make").

TEXT.English: Fossils are the preserved remains or traces of animals, plants, and other organisms from the remote past. The totality of fossils, both discovered and undiscovered, and their placement in fossiliferous (fossil-containing) rock formations and sedimentary layers (strata) is known as the fossil record. The study of fossils across geological time, how they were formed, and the evolutionary relationships between taxa (phylogeny) are some of the most important functions of the science of paleontology.
TEXT.Russian: 袨泻邪屑械薪械谢芯褋褌懈 - 褝褌芯 褋芯褏褉邪薪懈胁褕懈械褋褟 芯褋褌邪薪泻懈 懈谢懈 褋谢械写褘 卸懈胁芯褌薪褘褏, 褉邪褋褌械薪懈泄 懈 写褉褍谐懈褏 芯褉谐邪薪懈蟹屑芯胁 懈蟹 写邪谢械泻芯谐芯 锌褉芯褕谢芯谐芯. 小芯胁芯泻褍锌薪芯褋褌褜 芯泻邪屑械薪械谢芯褋褌械泄, 泻邪泻 芯褌泻褉褘褌褘褏, 褌邪泻 懈 薪械芯褌泻褉褘褌褘褏, 邪 褌邪泻卸械 懈褏 褉邪蟹屑械褖械薪懈械 胁 芯泻邪屑械薪械谢芯褋褌褟褏 (褋芯写械褉卸邪褖懈褏 芯泻邪屑械薪械谢芯褋褌懈) 褋泻邪谢褜薪褘褏 芯斜褉邪蟹芯胁邪薪懈褟褏 懈 芯褋邪写芯褔薪褘褏 褋谢芯褟褏 (锌谢邪褋褌邪褏) 懈蟹胁械褋褌薪芯 泻邪泻 谢械褌芯锌懈褋褜 芯泻邪屑械薪械谢芯褋褌械泄. 袠蟹褍褔械薪懈械 芯泻邪屑械薪械谢芯褋褌械泄 胁 谐械芯谢芯谐懈褔械褋泻芯屑 胁褉械屑械薪懈, 懈褏 芯斜褉邪蟹芯胁邪薪懈褟 懈 褝胁芯谢褞褑懈芯薪薪褘褏 胁蟹邪懈屑芯芯褌薪芯褕械薪懈泄 屑械卸写褍 褌邪泻褋芯薪邪屑懈 (褎懈谢芯谐械薪懈褟) - 芯写薪懈 懈蟹 褋邪屑褘褏 胁邪卸薪褘褏 褎褍薪泻褑懈泄 薪邪褍泻懈 锌邪谢械芯薪褌芯谢芯谐懈懈.

TEXT.English: Intensive gathering entails the tending-to of wild plants. Intensive gathering or "tending" methods include weeding, discouraging predators, pot-irrigation, and limited harvesting to ensure reproduction. The same system of methods is involved in cultivation, a process which additionally requires systematic soil preparation and planting to tending and harvesting. This human manipulation results in the domestication of involved plant life.
TEXT.French: La cueillette intensive implique le soin aux plantes sauvages. Ces m茅thodes incluent d茅sherbage, dissuasion des pr茅dateurs, irrigation en pot et r茅colte limit茅e pour assurer la reproduction. Le m锚me syst猫me s'applique 脿 la culture, n茅cessitant pr茅paration syst茅matique du sol, plantation, soin et r茅colte. Cette manipulation humaine m猫ne 脿 la domestication des plantes concern茅es.
TEXT.German: [COLOR_BUILDING_TEXT]Obst- und Traubensammler[COLOR_REVERT] gehen auf die Suche nach Trauben, Beeren, N眉ssen und anderen Fr眉chten. Dabei m眉ssen sie gr枚脽te Sorgfalt walten lassen, denn manch lecker aussehende Frucht ist f眉r Menschen ungenie脽bar oder sogar giftig. Au脽erdem gilt es auf den Reifegrad zu achten, denn sowohl unreife als auch 眉berreife Fr眉chte k枚nnen gesundheitliche Probleme verursachen. Schon fr眉hzeitig wurden gut schmeckende und nahrhafte Sorten bevorzugt und besonders gehegt, wodurch sie einen nicht zu untersch盲tzenden Vorteil gegen眉ber den unerw眉nschten Sorten bekamen. Diese Auslese war der erste Schritt zur Kultivierung von Obstpflanzen.
TEXT.Russian: 袠薪褌械薪褋懈胁薪褘泄 褋斜芯褉 锌褉械写锌芯谢邪谐邪械褌 褍褏芯写 蟹邪 写懈泻懈屑懈 褉邪褋褌械薪懈褟屑懈. 袦械褌芯写褘 懈薪褌械薪褋懈胁薪芯谐芯 褋斜芯褉邪 懈谢懈 芦褍褏芯写邪禄 胁泻谢褞褔邪褞褌 锌褉芯锌芯谢泻褍, 芯褌锌褍谐懈胁邪薪懈械 懈谢懈 懈褋褌褉械斜谢械薪懈械 胁褉械写懈褌械谢械泄, 芯褉芯褕械薪懈械 锌芯褔胁褘 懈 芯谐褉邪薪懈褔械薪薪褘泄 褋斜芯褉 褍褉芯卸邪褟 写谢褟 芯斜械褋锌械褔械薪懈褟 胁芯褋锌褉芯懈蟹胁芯写褋褌胁邪. 孝邪 卸械 褋懈褋褌械屑邪 屑械褌芯写芯胁 懈褋锌芯谢褜蟹褍械褌褋褟 锌褉懈 胁褘褉邪褖懈胁邪薪懈懈 - 锌褉芯褑械褋褋械, 泻芯褌芯褉褘泄 写芯锌芯谢薪懈褌械谢褜薪芯 褌褉械斜褍械褌 褋懈褋褌械屑邪褌懈褔械褋泻芯泄 锌芯写谐芯褌芯胁泻懈 锌芯褔胁褘 懈 锌芯褋邪写泻懈 写芯 褍褏芯写邪 懈 褋斜芯褉邪 褍褉芯卸邪褟. 协褌邪 褔械谢芯胁械褔械褋泻邪褟 屑邪薪懈锌褍谢褟褑懈褟 锌褉懈胁芯写懈褌 泻 芯泻褍谢褜褌褍褉懈胁邪薪懈褞 胁芯胁谢械褔械薪薪褘褏 褉邪褋褌械薪懈泄.

TEXT.English: Geothermal Borehole penetrates to Planet's mantle and provides significant minerals and energy. Boreholes have a significant negative ecological impact. Borehole Mining (BHM) is a remote operated method of extracting (mining) mineral resources through boreholes by means of high pressure water jets. This process can be carried-out from land surface, open pit floor, underground mine or floating platform or vessel through pre-drilled boreholes.
TEXT.French: Le forage g茅othermique p茅n猫tre jusqu'au manteau plan茅taire et fournit des min茅raux et de l'茅nergie importants. Les forages ont un impact 茅cologique n茅gatif significatif. L'extraction par forage (BHM) est une m茅thode t茅l茅command茅e d'extraction de minerais gr芒ce 脿 des jets d'eau haute pression. Ce processus peut se faire depuis la surface, fond de carri猫re, mine souterraine ou plateforme/vaisseau flottant via des forages pr茅-perc茅s.

TEXT.English: Groundwater Wells are typically created using either top-head rotary style, table rotary, or cable tool drilling machines, all of which use drilling stems that are turned to create a cutting action in the formation, hence the term drilling. Drilled wells can be excavated by simple hand drilling methods (augering, sludging, jetting, driving, hand percussion) or machine drilling (rotary, percussion, down the hole hammer). Deeprock rotary drilling method is most common. Rotary can be used in 90% of formation types.

TEXT.English: A hamlet is usually a rural settlement which is too small to be considered a village, though sometimes the word is used for a different sort of community. The name comes from Anglo-Norman hamelet (t)e; Old French hamelet, the diminutive of Old French hamel. Another diminutive of Old French ham is possibly a cognate with similar words of Germanic origin. Compare with Dutch heem, German Heim, Swiss German cham or -kon, Old English ham and Modern English home, all derived from the Proto-Germanic *kham-. Historically, when a hamlet became large enough to justify building a church, it was then classified as a village. One example of a hamlet is a small cluster of houses surrounding a mill.

TEXT.English: The term camp comes from the Latin word campus, meaning "field". Therefore, a campsite consists typically of open pieces of ground where a camper can pitch a tent or park a camper. More specifically a campsite is a dedicated area set aside for camping and for which often a user fee is charged. Campsites typically feature a few (but sometimes no) improvements.
TEXT.French: Provenant du latin campus, signifiant "champ". Ainsi, un campement est g茅n茅ralement un lieu plat ou le campeur peut installer une tente, avec 茅ventuellement quelques am茅nagements pour am茅liorer son confort.

TEXT.English: You see in this dome the intermingling of native and earth plants. Outside, they are competitors, struggling over the trace elements required for life. Often, one destroys the other. Here, they are tended with care and kept well nourished. They thrive together, and the native fungus does not unleash its terrible defenses. As you can see, competition is unnecessary when resources are plentiful and population growth is controlled.
TEXT.French: Dans ce d么me se m锚lent plantes natives et terrestres. Dehors, elles sont concurrentes pour les oligo-茅l茅ments n茅cessaires 脿 la vie, souvent l'une d茅truit l'autre. Ici, elles sont soigneusement entretenues et bien nourries. Elles prosp猫rent ensemble, et le champignon indig猫ne ne lib猫re pas ses d茅fenses terribles. Comme vous le voyez, la comp茅tition est inutile quand les ressources abondent et la croissance d茅mographique est contr么l茅e.

TEXT.English: An oil well is a general term for any boring through the earth's surface that is designed to find and acquire petroleum oil hydrocarbons. Usually some natural gas is produced along with the oil. A well that is designed to produce mainly or only gas may be termed a gas well.

TEXT.English: Indigenous Communities represent the enduring settlements of primative peoples. Many countries, such as the United States with the American Indians or the primative tribes that dot South American nations, must balance the sovereign and human rights of these people with the demands of development.

De nombreux pays, comme les 脡tats-Unis avec les Indiens d'Am茅rique ou les tribus primitives des nations sud-am茅ricaines, doivent 茅quilibrer les droits souverains et humains de ces peuples avec les exigences du d茅veloppement.

TEXT.English: Can only be built on Reefs and Coral. Before the development of clearly defined ports mariners were guided by fires built on hilltops. Since raising the fire would improve the visibility, placing the fire on a platform became a practice that led to the development of the lighthouse. In antiquity, the lighthouse functioned more as an entrance marker to ports than as a warning signal for reefs and promontories, unlike many modern lighthouses.
TEXT.French: Ne peut 锚tre construit que sur des r茅cifs et coraux. Avant le d茅veloppement de ports clairement d茅finis, les marins 茅taient guid茅s par des feux construits sur les sommets de collines. 脡lever le feu am茅liorant la visibilit茅, le placer sur une plateforme est devenu une pratique menant 脿 la construction des phares. Dans l'Antiquit茅, le phare servait plus de marqueur d'entr茅e que de signal d'avertissement pour r茅cifs et promontoires, contrairement aux phares modernes.
TEXT.Italian: Pu貌 essere costruito solo su scogli e coralli. Prima dello sviluppo di porti chiaramente definiti, i marinai erano guidati da fuochi accesi in cima alle colline. Dato che alzare il fuoco migliorava la visibilit脿, posizionare il fuoco su una piattaforma divenne una pratica che port貌 allo sviluppo del faro. Nell'antichit脿, il faro funzionava pi霉 come segnale d'entrata ai porti piuttosto che segnale per scogli e promontori, a differenza della maggior parte dei fari moderni.

TEXT.English: A [COLOR_BUILDING_TEXT]Lumberyard[COLOR_REVERT] is a retail location for lumber and wood related products used in construction and/or home improvement projects. Lumber yards can also provide services such as the use of a planer and other large machines.

TEXT.English: A marine preserve is a park consisting of an area of sea (or lake) sometimes protected for recreational use, but more often set aside to preserve a specific habitat and ensure the ecosystem is sustained for the organisms that exist there. Most marine parks are designated by governments, and organized like 'watery' national parks. Although for many uses it is sufficient to designate the boundaries of the marine park and to inform commercial fishing boats and other maritime enterprises, some parks have gone to additional effort to make their wonders accessible to visitors. These can range from glass-bottomed boats and small submarines, to windowed undersea tubes.
TEXT.Russian: 袦芯褉褋泻芯泄 蟹邪锌芯胁械写薪懈泻 - 褝褌芯 锌褉懈褉芯写芯芯褏褉邪薪薪邪褟 蟹芯薪邪, 褋芯褋褌芯褟褖懈泄 懈蟹 褍褔邪褋褌泻邪 屑芯褉褟 (懈谢懈 芯蟹械褉邪), 泻芯褌芯褉褘泄 懈薪芯谐写邪 芯褏褉邪薪褟械褌褋褟 写谢褟 褉械泻褉械邪褑懈芯薪薪芯谐芯 懈褋锌芯谢褜蟹芯胁邪薪懈褟, 薪芯 褔邪褖械 胁褘写械谢褟械褌褋褟 写谢褟 褋芯褏褉邪薪械薪懈褟 芯锌褉械写械谢械薪薪芯泄 褋褉械写褘 芯斜懈褌邪薪懈褟 懈 芯斜械褋锌械褔械薪懈褟 褍褋褌芯泄褔懈胁芯褋褌懈 褝泻芯褋懈褋褌械屑褘 写谢褟 芯褉谐邪薪懈蟹屑芯胁, 泻芯褌芯褉褘械 褌邪屑 褋褍褖械褋褌胁褍褞褌. 袘芯谢褜褕懈薪褋褌胁芯 屑芯褉褋泻懈褏 蟹邪锌芯胁械写薪懈泻芯胁 薪邪蟹薪邪褔邪褞褌褋褟 锌褉邪胁懈褌械谢褜褋褌胁邪屑懈 懈 芯褉谐邪薪懈蟹芯胁邪薪褘 泻邪泻 芦胁芯写薪褘械禄 薪邪褑懈芯薪邪谢褜薪褘械 锌邪褉泻懈. 啸芯褌褟 写谢褟 屑薪芯谐懈褏 褑械谢械泄 写芯褋褌邪褌芯褔薪芯 芯斜芯蟹薪邪褔懈褌褜 谐褉邪薪懈褑褘 屑芯褉褋泻芯谐芯 锌邪褉泻邪 懈 锌褉芯懈薪褎芯褉屑懈褉芯胁邪褌褜 泻芯屑屑械褉褔械褋泻懈械 褉褘斜芯谢芯胁薪褘械 褋褍写邪 懈 写褉褍谐懈械 屑芯褉褋泻懈械 锌褉械写锌褉懈褟褌懈褟, 薪械泻芯褌芯褉褘械 锌邪褉泻懈 锌褉懈谢芯卸懈谢懈 写芯锌芯谢薪懈褌械谢褜薪褘械 褍褋懈谢懈褟, 褔褌芯斜褘 褋写械谢邪褌褜 褋胁芯懈 褔褍写械褋邪 写芯褋褌褍锌薪褘屑懈 写谢褟 锌芯褋械褌懈褌械谢械泄. 袨薪懈 屑芯谐褍褌 胁邪褉褜懈褉芯胁邪褌褜褋褟 芯褌 谢芯写芯泻 褋芯 褋褌械泻谢褟薪薪褘屑 写薪芯屑 懈 薪械斜芯谢褜褕懈褏 锌芯写胁芯写薪褘褏 谢芯写芯泻 写芯 锌芯写胁芯写薪褘褏 褌褉褍斜 褋 芯泻薪邪屑懈.

TEXT.Russian: * 脴脿玫貌脿: 芒帽氓 枚猫芒猫毛猫莽脿枚猫猫* 脴脿玫貌脿 (铆氓矛.): 脙氓冒矛脿铆猫每* 脴脿玫貌脿 (猫帽茂.): 脠帽茂脿铆猫每脙卯冒铆脿每 茂冒卯矛没酶毛氓铆铆卯帽貌眉 - 猫莽芒毛氓梅氓铆猫氓 枚氓铆铆没玫 茂卯毛氓莽铆没玫 猫帽锚卯茂脿氓矛没玫 猫毛猫 盲冒贸茫猫玫 茫氓卯毛卯茫猫梅氓帽锚猫玫 矛脿貌氓冒猫脿毛卯芒 猫莽 莽氓矛毛猫, 忙猫毛没, (贸茫卯毛眉铆卯茫卯) 茂毛脿帽貌脿 猫毛猫 冒猫么脿, 锚卯貌卯冒没茅 么卯冒矛猫冒贸氓貌 矛猫铆氓冒脿毛猫莽卯芒脿铆铆没茅 茫卯冒猫莽卯铆貌 猫 矛氓帽貌卯 媒锚卯铆卯矛猫梅氓帽锚卯茫卯 猫铆貌氓冒氓帽脿 盲毛每 酶脿玫貌氓冒脿. 脤脿貌氓冒猫脿毛没 媒锚卯铆卯矛猫梅氓帽锚卯茫卯 猫铆貌氓冒氓帽脿 (铆脿莽没芒脿氓矛没氓 猫铆脿梅氓 冒贸盲卯茅) 铆脿茅盲氓铆铆没氓 茫卯冒铆卯茅 茂冒卯矛没酶毛氓铆铆卯帽貌眉镁 芒锚毛镁梅脿镁貌 枚芒氓貌铆没氓 矛氓貌脿毛毛没, 盲冒脿茫卯枚氓铆铆没氓 矛氓貌脿毛毛没, 忙氓毛氓莽卯, 贸冒脿铆, 贸茫卯毛眉, 脿毛矛脿莽没, 猫莽芒氓帽貌铆每锚, 铆氓么貌每铆卯茅 帽毛脿铆氓枚, 锚脿矛氓铆铆脿每 帽卯毛眉 猫 茂卯貌脿酶. - Wikipedia

TEXT.English: As the 21st century begins, a globalized mining industry of large multinational corporations has arisen. Peak minerals and environmental impacts have also become a concern. Different elements, particularly rare earth minerals, have begun to increase in demand as a result of new technologies.
TEXT.French: Au d茅but du XXIe si猫cle, une industrie mini猫re mondialis茅e compos茅e de grandes multinationales s'est d茅velopp茅e. Les pics de minerai et l'impact environnemental suscitent aussi des inqui茅tudes. La demande en certains 茅l茅ments, sp茅cialement les terres rares, augmente du fait des nouvelles technologies.
TEXT.Russian: 袙 薪邪褔邪谢械 XXI 胁械泻邪 胁芯蟹薪懈泻谢邪 谐谢芯斜邪谢懈蟹懈褉芯胁邪薪薪邪褟 谐芯褉薪芯写芯斜褘胁邪褞褖邪褟 锌褉芯屑褘褕谢械薪薪芯褋褌褜 泻褉褍锌薪褘褏 褌褉邪薪褋薪邪褑懈芯薪邪谢褜薪褘褏 泻芯褉锌芯褉邪褑懈泄. 袚芯褉薪褘械 锌芯谢械蟹薪褘械 懈褋泻芯锌邪械屑褘械 懈 胁芯蟹写械泄褋褌胁懈械 薪邪 芯泻褉褍卸邪褞褖褍褞 褋褉械写褍 褌邪泻卸械 褋褌邪谢懈 薪邪褋褍褖薪芯泄 锌褉芯斜谢械屑芯泄. 小锌褉芯褋 薪邪 褉邪蟹谢懈褔薪褘械 褝谢械屑械薪褌褘, 芯褋芯斜械薪薪芯 褉械写泻芯蟹械屑械谢褜薪褘械 屑懈薪械褉邪谢褘, 褋褌邪谢 褉邪褋褌懈 胁 褉械蟹褍谢褜褌邪褌械 锌芯褟胁谢械薪懈褟 薪芯胁褘褏 褌械褏薪芯谢芯谐懈泄.
脨贸盲铆猫锚

TEXT.English: Mountaintop removal mining, also known as mountaintop mining, is a form of surface mining that involves the mining of the summit or summit ridge of a mountain. Coal seams are extracted from a mountain by removing the land, or overburden, above the seams. The MTR process involves the removal of coal seams by first fully removing the overburden laying atop them, exposing the seams from above. This method differs from more traditional underground mining, where typically a narrow shaft is dug which allows miners to collect seams using various underground methods, while leaving the vast majority of the overburden undisturbed. The overburden from MTR is either placed back on the ridge, attempting to reflect the approximate original contour of the mountain, and/or it is moved into neighboring valleys.
TEXT.Russian: 袚芯褉薪褘械 褉邪蟹褉邪斜芯褌泻懈 锌褉械写褋褌邪胁谢褟械褌 褋芯斜芯泄 褎芯褉屑褍 写芯斜褘褔懈 薪邪 锌芯胁械褉褏薪芯褋褌懈, 胁泻谢褞褔邪褞褖褍褞 胁 褋械斜褟 芯褋胁芯械薪懈械 胁械褉褕懈薪褘 懈谢懈 谐褉械斜薪褟 谐芯褉褘. 校谐芯谢褜薪褘械 锌谢邪褋褌褘 懈蟹胁谢械泻邪褞褌褋褟 懈蟹 谐芯褉 锌褍褌械屑 褍写邪谢械薪懈褟 谐褉褍薪褌邪 懈谢懈 锌芯泻褉褘胁邪褞褖懈褏 锌芯褉芯写 薪邪写 锌谢邪褋褌邪屑懈. 袩褉芯褑械褋褋 MTR 胁泻谢褞褔邪械褌 褍写邪谢械薪懈械 褍谐芯谢褜薪褘褏 锌谢邪褋褌芯胁, 褋薪邪褔邪谢邪 锌芯谢薪芯褋褌褜褞 褍写邪谢褟褟 锌芯泻褉褘胁邪褞褖褍褞 褌芯谢褖褍, 谢械卸邪褖褍褞 薪邪 薪懈褏, 芯斜薪邪卸邪褟 锌谢邪褋褌褘 褋胁械褉褏褍. 协褌芯褌 屑械褌芯写 芯褌谢懈褔邪械褌褋褟 芯褌 斜芯谢械械 褌褉邪写懈褑懈芯薪薪褘褏 锌芯写蟹械屑薪褘褏 谐芯褉薪褘褏 褉邪斜芯褌, 泻芯谐写邪 芯斜褘褔薪芯 胁褘泻邪锌褘胁邪械褌褋褟 褍蟹泻邪褟 褕邪褏褌邪, 褔褌芯 锌芯蟹胁芯谢褟械褌 谐芯褉薪褟泻邪屑 褋芯斜懈褉邪褌褜 锌谢邪褋褌褘, 懈褋锌芯谢褜蟹褍褟 褉邪蟹谢懈褔薪褘械 锌芯写蟹械屑薪褘械 屑械褌芯写褘, 锌褉懈 褝褌芯屑 锌芯写邪胁谢褟褞褖邪褟 褔邪褋褌褜 胁褋泻褉褘褌褘褏 锌芯褉芯写 芯褋褌邪械褌褋褟 薪械褌褉芯薪褍褌芯泄. 袩芯泻褉褘胁邪褞褖邪褟 锌芯褉芯写邪 芯褌 MTR 谢懈斜芯 锌芯屑械褖邪械褌褋褟 芯斜褉邪褌薪芯 薪邪 谐褉械斜械薪褜, 锌褘褌邪褟褋褜 芯褌褉邪蟹懈褌褜 锌褉懈斜谢懈蟹懈褌械谢褜薪褘泄 懈褋褏芯写薪褘泄 泻芯薪褌褍褉 谐芯褉褘, 谢懈斜芯 锌械褉械屑械褖邪械褌褋褟 胁 褋芯褋械写薪懈械 写芯谢懈薪褘.

TEXT.English: Mushroom hunting, mushrooming, mushroom picking, mushroom foraging, and similar terms describe the activity of gathering mushrooms in the wild, typically for eating. This is popular in most of Europe, including the Nordic, Baltic, and Slavic countries and the Mediterranean Basin, as well as in Australia, Japan, Korea, Canada, the Indian subcontinent, and the northwestern, northeastern, Midwestern and Appalachian United States.
TEXT.French: La chasse aux champignons ou cueillette d茅signe l'activit茅 de r茅colte de champignons sauvages, g茅n茅ralement pour la consommation. C'est populaire dans la plupart de l'Europe, y compris les pays nordiques, baltes, slaves, le bassin m茅diterran茅en, ainsi qu'en Australie, Japon, Cor茅e, Canada, sous-continent indien, et dans les r茅gions nord-ouest, nord-est, centre et Appalaches des 脡tats-Unis.
TEXT.German: Das Sammeln von Pilzen ist eine beliebte Freizeitbesch盲ftigung in nahezu allen Teilen der Welt. [COLOR_BUILDING_TEXT]Pilzsammler[COLOR_REVERT] gehen auf die Suche nach essbaren Wildpilzen, normalerweise um diese zu verzehren oder zu verkaufen. Sie m眉ssen dabei allerdings gr枚脽te Sorgfalt walten lassen, um nicht durch versehentlich geerntete Giftpilze eine Pilzvergiftung zu riskieren. Da es teils 盲hnlich aussehende Speise- und Giftpilze gibt und manche Pilze erst nach entsprechender Zubereitung genie脽bar werden, sind botanische Kenntnisse dringend erforderlich und jeder Sammler sollte nur die Pilze verwenden, die er zweifelsfrei identifizieren kann.
TEXT.Russian: 袨褏芯褌邪 蟹邪 谐褉懈斜邪屑懈, 褋斜芯褉 谐褉懈斜芯胁 懈 邪薪邪谢芯谐懈褔薪褘械 褌械褉屑懈薪褘 芯锌懈褋褘胁邪褞褌 写械褟褌械谢褜薪芯褋褌褜 锌芯 褋芯斜懈褉邪褌械谢褜褋褌褌胁褍 谐褉懈斜芯胁 薪邪 写懈泻芯泄 锌褉懈褉芯写械, 褔邪褖械 胁褋械谐芯 写谢褟 褍锌芯褌褉械斜谢械薪懈褟 胁 锌懈褖褍. 袨薪邪 胁械褋褜屑邪 锌芯锌褍谢褟褉薪邪 胁 斜芯谢褜褕懈薪褋褌胁械 褋褌褉邪薪 袝胁褉芯锌褘, 胁泻谢褞褔邪褟 小械胁械褉薪褘械, 袘邪谢褌懈泄褋泻懈械 懈 小谢邪胁褟薪褋泻懈械 褋褌褉邪薪褘 懈 小褉械写懈蟹械屑薪芯屑芯褉褋泻懈泄 斜邪褋褋械泄薪, 邪 褌邪泻卸械 胁 袗胁褋褌褉邪谢懈懈, 携锌芯薪懈懈, 袣芯褉械械, 袣邪薪邪写械, 袠薪写懈泄褋泻芯屑 褋褍斜泻芯薪褌懈薪械薪褌械, 邪 褌邪泻卸械 薪邪 褋械胁械褉芯-蟹邪锌邪写械, 褋械胁械褉芯-胁芯褋褌芯泻械, 小褉械写薪械屑 袟邪锌邪写械 懈 袗锌锌邪谢邪褔邪褏 小楔袗.

TEXT.English: A nature reserve is a protected area of importance for wildlife, flora, fauna or features of geological or other special interest, which is reserved and managed for conservation and to provide special opportunities for study or research. Nature reserves may be designated by government institutions in some countries, or by private landowners, such as charities and research institutions, regardless of nationality. Nature reserves fall into different IUCN categories depending on the level of protection afforded by local laws.

TEXT.English: An orchard is an intentional planting of trees or shrubs that is maintained for food production. Orchards comprise fruit, vegetable, and nut-producing trees which are grown for commercial production. Orchards are also sometimes a feature of large gardens, where they serve an aesthetic as well as a productive purpose. A fruit garden is generally synonymous with an orchard, although it is set on a smaller non-commercial scale and may emphasize berry shrubs in preference to fruit trees. Most temperate-zone orchards are laid out in a regular grid, with a grazed or mown grass or bare soil base that makes maintenance and fruit gathering easy.
TEXT.Russian: 肖褉褍泻褌芯胁褘泄 褋邪写 - 褝褌芯 蟹邪锌谢邪薪懈褉芯胁邪薪薪邪褟 锌芯褋邪写泻邪 写械褉械胁褜械胁 懈谢懈 泻褍褋褌邪褉薪懈泻芯胁, 锌褉械写薪邪蟹薪邪褔械薪薪邪褟 写谢褟 胁褘褉邪褖懈胁邪薪懈褟 锌褉芯写褍泻褌芯胁 锌懈褌邪薪懈褟. 袙 褋邪写邪褏 锌褉械写褋褌邪胁谢械薪褘 褎褉褍泻褌芯胁褘械 懈 芯褉械褏芯胁褘械 写械褉械胁褜褟, 邪 褌邪泻卸械 芯胁芯褖懈, 胁褘褉邪褖懈胁邪械屑褘械 薪邪 锌褉芯写邪卸褍 懈谢懈 谢懈褔薪芯械 锌芯褌褉械斜谢械薪懈械. 肖褉褍泻褌芯胁褘械 褋邪写褘 褌邪泻卸械 懈薪芯谐写邪 褟胁谢褟褞褌褋褟 芯褌谢懈褔懈褌械谢褜薪芯泄 褔械褉褌芯泄 斜芯谢褜褕懈褏 褋邪写芯胁, 谐写械 芯薪懈 褋谢褍卸邪褌 泻邪泻 褝褋褌械褌懈褔械褋泻懈屑, 褌邪泻 懈 锌褉芯写褍泻褌懈胁薪褘屑 褑械谢褟屑. 肖褉褍泻褌芯胁褘泄 褋邪写 芯斜褘褔薪芯 褟胁谢褟械褌褋褟 褋懈薪芯薪懈屑芯屑 褋邪写邪, 褏芯褌褟 芯薪 褋芯蟹写邪薪 胁 屑械薪褜褕械屑 薪械泻芯屑屑械褉褔械褋泻芯屑 屑邪褋褕褌邪斜械 懈 屑芯卸械褌 芯褌写邪胁邪褌褜 锌褉械写锌芯褔褌械薪懈械 褟谐芯写薪褘屑 泻褍褋褌邪褉薪懈泻邪屑, 邪 薪械 褎褉褍泻褌芯胁褘屑 写械褉械胁褜褟屑. 袘芯谢褜褕懈薪褋褌胁芯 褋邪写芯胁 褍屑械褉械薪薪芯谐芯 锌芯褟褋邪 褉邪蟹斜懈褌褘 锌芯 褉械谐褍谢褟褉薪芯泄 褋械褌泻械 褋 锌芯写褋褌褉懈卸械薪薪芯泄 懈谢懈 褋泻芯褕械薪薪芯泄 褌褉邪胁芯泄 懈谢懈 谐芯谢芯泄 锌芯褔胁芯泄, 褔褌芯 褍锌褉芯褖邪械褌 褍褏芯写 懈 褋斜芯褉 褍褉芯卸邪褟.

TEXT.English: Pasture is land with vegetation cover used for grazing of livestock as part of a farm, or in ranching or other unenclosed pastoral systems or used by wild animals for grazing or browsing. Prior to the advent of factory farming, pasture was the primary source of food for grazing animals such as cattle and horses. It is still used extensively, particularly in arid regions where pasture land is unsuitable for any other agricultural production. In more humid regions, pasture grazing is exploited extensively for free range and organic farming.
TEXT.Polish: Pastwisko - rodzaj u¿ytków zielonych poroœniêtych g³ównie wieloletnimi trawami, których wegetacja trwa niezale¿nie od tego, czy s¹ to tereny uprawowe, czy te¿ nieu¿ytki. Zwykle od wiosny do jesieni na pastwiskach wypasa siê zwierzêta hodowlane, takie jak byd³o domowe, owce czy te¿ kozy. Pastwiska uprawowe powstaj¹ najczêœciej w trzecim roku tzw. p³odozmianu, a ich okres eksploatowania wynosi najczêœciej kilka lat (3-5). Corocznie wymagaj¹ pewnych zabiegów rolniczych jak w³ókowanie, bronowanie i nawo¿enie. W³ókowanie i bronowanie ma na celu pobudzenie systemu korzennego traw, ale równie¿ zniwelowanie kretowisk i usuniêcie tzw. "niedojadów". U¿ytkowe pastwiska s¹ najczêœciej ogrodzone i umo¿liwiaj¹ dowóz wody dla zwierz¹t. Pastwiska-nieu¿ytki najczêœciej s¹ eksploatowane przez hodowców owiec i kóz, ze wzglêdu na ich skromniejsze wymagania ¿ywieniowe. Nie oznacza to jednak, ¿e tego typu pastwiska nie wymagaj¹ pewnych zabiegów pratotechnicznych. Czêsto stosuje siê ogrodzenia np. p³ot elektryczny, w celu uniemo¿liwienia zwierzêtom przekroczenia granicy pastwiska.

TEXT.English: Peat is harvested as an important source of fuel in certain parts of the world. By volume, there are about 4 trillion cubic meters of peat in the world covering a total of around 2% of global land area (about 3 million square kms), containing about 8 billion terajoules of energy.

TEXT.English: A plantation is a large artificially established forest, farm or estate, where crops are grown for sale, often in distant markets rather than for local on-site consumption. The term plantation is informal and not precisely defined.

TEXT.English: Intensive gathering entails the tending-to of wild plants. Intensive gathering or "tending" methods include weeding, discouraging predators, pot-irrigation, and limited harvesting to ensure reproduction. The same system of methods is involved in cultivation, a process which additionally requires systematic soil preparation and planting to tending and harvesting. This human manipulation results in the domestication of involved plant life.
TEXT.French: La cueillette intensive implique le soin aux plantes sauvages. Les m茅thodes comprennent le d茅sherbage, la dissuasion des pr茅dateurs, l'irrigation en pot, et des r茅coltes limit茅es pour assurer la reproduction. Les m锚mes m茅thodes s'appliquent 脿 la culture, qui inclut la pr茅paration syst茅matique du sol et la plantation. Cette manipulation conduit 脿 la domestication des plantes concern茅es.
TEXT.German: [COLOR_BUILDING_TEXT]Pflanzensucher[COLOR_REVERT] sammeln n眉tzliche Pflanzen und Pflanzenteile, die nicht der Ern盲hrung dienen. Es kann sich dabei z.B. um Baumaterialien, Farbstoffe oder Fasern f眉r die Herstellung von Kleidung handeln. W盲hrend zun盲chst einfach alles zusammengerafft wurde, dessen man habhaft werden konnte, gingen die Menschen sp盲ter immer gezielter vor. Sie vernichteten die Pflanzen nicht mehr komplett, sondern achteten darauf, nur die verwertbaren Teile zu verwenden. Um beste Ertr盲ge zu garantieren, wurden die Pflanzen in Trockenzeiten gegossen, unwichtige Nahrungskonkurrenten (Unkr盲uter) gej盲tet, Sch盲dlinge und Raubtiere ferngehalten. Mit dieser Hege und Bevorzugung n眉tzlicher Pflanzen waren die Grundlagen f眉r die Kultivierung und den Feldbau gelegt.

TEXT.English: A quarry is a type of open-pit mine from which rock or minerals are extracted. Quarries are generally used for extracting building materials, such as dimension stone, construction aggregate, riprap, sand, and gravel. They are often colocated with concrete and asphalt plants due to the requirement for large amounts of aggregate in those materials. The word quarry can include underground quarrying for stone, such as Bath stone.
TEXT.French: Une carri猫re est une mine 脿 ciel ouvert d'o霉 sont extraits roches ou min茅raux. Les carri猫res servent g茅n茅ralement 脿 extraire des mat茅riaux de construction tels que pierres dimensionnelles, granulats, blocs, sable et gravier. Elles sont souvent situ茅es 脿 proximit茅 d'usines de b茅ton et d'asphalte du fait du besoin de gros agr茅gats. Le terme peut aussi d茅signer des carri猫res souterraines, comme la pierre de Bath.

TEXT.German: Bevor entsprechende Waffen und Jagdtechniken entwickelt wurden, waren die Menschen gezwungen, sich die tierischen Bestandteile ihrer Nahrung wie Fleisch und Knochenmark zusammenzusuchen. [COLOR_BUILDING_TEXT]Fleischsammler[COLOR_REVERT] gingen auf die Suche nach kleinen Tieren wie Ameisen und W眉rmern. Wenn sich die M枚glichkeit bot, wurden aber auch verwertbare St眉cke von toten Tieren eingesammelt. Hierbei musste behutsam vorgegangen werden, denn zu Beginn des F盲ulnisprozesses ist das Fleisch f眉r Menschen zwar noch essbar, bereits st盲rker verwestes Fleisch wird jedoch ungenie脽bar und f眉hrt zu Krankheit oder gar dem Tod. Dies liegt an den enthaltenen Bakterien und den von ihnen produzierten Abbauprodukten wie z.B. Botulinumtoxin, die f眉r den Menschen stark toxisch sind.

TEXT.English: [COLOR_BUILDING_TEXT]Seed Camps[COLOR_REVERT] first appeared in the Stone Ages. Prehistoric humans used to obtain food from Hunting and Grain Gathering. Seed Camps were special places were [COLOR_UNIT_TEXT]Gatherers[COLOR_REVERT] kept the gathered seeds that where used to feed the Tribe.

Les camps de semences 茅taient des lieux sp茅ciaux o霉 les [COLOR_UNIT_TEXT]cueilleurs[COLOR_REVERT] conservaient les graines r茅colt茅es utilis茅es pour nourrir la tribu.

TEXT.Russian: [COLOR_BUILDING_TEXT]袟械褉薪芯褏褉邪薪懈谢懈褖邪[COLOR_REVERT] 胁锌械褉胁褘械 锌芯褟胁懈谢懈褋褜 胁 泻邪屑械薪薪芯屑 胁械泻械. 袩械褉胁芯斜褘褌薪褘械 谢褞写懈 写芯斜褘胁邪谢懈 锌懈褖褍 胁芯 胁褉械屑褟 芯褏芯褌褘 懈 褋斜芯褉邪 蟹谢邪泻芯胁 懈谢懈 泻芯褉薪械锌谢芯写芯胁. 袟械褉薪芯褏褉邪薪懈谢懈褖邪 斜褘谢懈 芯褋芯斜褘屑懈 屑械褋褌邪屑懈, 胁 泻芯褌芯褉褘褏 [COLOR_UNIT_TEXT]小芯斜懈褉邪褌械谢懈[COLOR_REVERT] 褏褉邪薪懈谢懈 褋芯斜褉邪薪薪褘械 褋械屑械薪邪, 泻芯褌芯褉褘械 懈褋锌芯谢褜蟹芯胁邪谢懈褋褜 写谢褟 锌褉芯泻芯褉屑邪 胁褋械谐芯 锌谢械屑械薪懈.

TEXT.English: Shaft mining or shaft sinking refers to the method of excavating a vertical or near-vertical tunnel from the top down, where there is initially no access to the bottom. Shaft sinking refers to the general activity, however shallow shafts, typically sunk for civil engineering projects differ greatly in execution method from deep shafts, typically sunk for mining projects. When the top of the excavation is the ground surface, it is referred to as a shaft; when the top of the excavation is underground, it is called a winze or a sub-shaft. Small shafts may be excavated upwards from within an existing mine as long as there is access at the bottom, in which case they are called Raises.
TEXT.Russian: 袚谢褍斜芯泻邪褟 褕邪褏褌邪 懈谢懈 褋泻胁邪卸懈薪邪 芯褌薪芯褋懈褌褋褟 泻 屑械褌芯写褍 胁褘械屑泻懈 锌芯褉芯写褘 胁 胁械褉褌懈泻邪谢褜薪芯屑 褌褍薪薪械谢械 褋胁械褉褏褍 胁薪懈蟹, 谐写械 懈蟹薪邪褔邪谢褜薪芯 薪械褌 写芯褋褌褍锌邪 泻 卸懈谢械. 袨锌褍褋泻邪薪懈械 褋褌胁芯谢邪 芯褌薪芯褋懈褌褋褟 泻 芯褋薪芯胁薪芯泄 写械褟褌械谢褜薪芯褋褌懈, 芯写薪邪泻芯 屑械谢泻懈械 芯褌胁芯写褘, 芯斜褘褔薪芯 蟹邪褌芯锌谢械薪薪褘械 写谢褟 锌褉芯械泻褌芯胁 谐褉邪卸写邪薪褋泻芯谐芯 褋褌褉芯懈褌械谢褜褋褌胁邪, 蟹薪邪褔懈褌械谢褜薪芯 芯褌谢懈褔邪褞褌褋褟 锌芯 褋锌芯褋芯斜褍 胁褘锌芯谢薪械薪懈褟 芯褌 谐谢褍斜芯泻懈褏 褋褌胁芯谢芯胁, 芯斜褘褔薪芯 蟹邪褌芯锌谢褟械屑褘褏 写谢褟 写芯斜褘褔懈 锌芯谢械蟹薪褘褏 懈褋泻芯锌邪械屑褘褏. 袣芯谐写邪 胁械褉褕懈薪邪 褉邪褋泻芯锌芯泻 胁褘褏芯写懈褌 薪邪 锌芯胁械褉褏薪芯褋褌褜 蟹械屑谢懈, 芯薪邪 薪邪蟹褘胁邪械褌褋褟 褕邪褏褌芯泄; 泻芯谐写邪 卸械 芯薪邪 薪邪褏芯写懈褌褋褟 锌芯写 蟹械屑谢械泄, 械械 薪邪蟹褘胁邪褞褌 褕褌芯谢褜薪械泄 懈谢懈 胁褋锌芯屑芯谐邪褌械谢褜薪褘屑 褕褌褉械泻芯屑. 袧械斜芯谢褜褕懈械 褕邪褏褌褘 屑芯谐褍褌 斜褘褌褜 胁褘泻芯锌邪薪褘 锌芯胁胁械褉褏 懈蟹 褋褍褖械褋褌胁褍褞褖械泄 褕邪褏褌褘, 械褋谢懈 械褋褌褜 写芯褋褌褍锌 泻 锌芯褉芯写械, 懈 胁 褝褌芯屑 褋谢褍褔邪械 芯薪懈 薪邪蟹褘胁邪褞褌褋褟 褕褌芯谢褜薪褟屑懈.

TEXT.English: Sericulture, or silk farming, is the rearing of silkworms for the production of silk. Although there are several commercial species of silkworms, Bombyx mori is the most widely used and intensively studied silkworm. Silk was first produced in China as early as the Neolithic period. Sericulture has become an important cottage industries in countries such as Brazil, China, France, India, Italy, Japan, Korea, and Russia. Today, China and India are the two main producers, with more than 60% of the world's annual production.

TEXT.English: Underwater habitats are underwater structures in which people can live for extended periods and carry out most of the basic human functions of a 24-hour day, such as working, resting, eating, attending to personal hygiene, and sleeping. In this context 'habitat' is generally used in a narrow sense to mean the interior and immediate exterior of the structure and its fixtures, but not its surrounding marine environment. Most early underwater habitats lacked regenerative systems for air, water, food, electricity, and other resources. However, recently some new underwater habitats allow for these resources to be delivered using pipes, or generated within the habitat, rather than manually delivered.
TEXT.Russian: 袩芯写胁芯写薪褘械 卸懈谢懈褖邪 - 褝褌芯 褌懈锌 锌芯写胁芯写薪褘褏 褋芯芯褉褍卸械薪懈泄, 胁 泻芯褌芯褉芯屑 谢褞写懈 屑芯谐褍褌 卸懈褌褜 胁 褌械褔械薪懈械 写谢懈褌械谢褜薪褘褏 锌械褉懈芯写芯胁 胁褉械屑械薪懈 懈 胁褘锌芯谢薪褟褌褜 斜芯谢褜褕懈薪褋褌胁芯 芯褋薪芯胁薪褘褏 蟹邪写邪褔 胁 褌械褔械薪懈械 24 褔邪褋芯胁, 褌邪泻懈褏 泻邪泻 褉邪斜芯褌邪, 芯褌写褘褏, 械写邪, 蟹邪斜芯褌邪 芯 谢懈褔薪芯泄 谐懈谐懈械薪械 懈 褋芯薪. 袙 褝褌芯屑 泻芯薪褌械泻褋褌械 芦褋褉械写邪 芯斜懈褌邪薪懈褟禄 芯斜褘褔薪芯 懈褋锌芯谢褜蟹褍械褌褋褟 胁 褍蟹泻芯屑 褋屑褘褋谢械, 褔褌芯斜褘 芯斜芯蟹薪邪褔邪褌褜 胁薪褍褌褉械薪薪褞褞 懈 薪械锌芯褋褉械写褋褌胁械薪薪褍褞 胁薪械褕薪芯褋褌褜 泻芯薪褋褌褉褍泻褑懈懈 懈 械械 锌褉懈褋锌芯褋芯斜谢械薪懈泄, 薪芯 薪械 芯泻褉褍卸邪褞褖褍褞 屑芯褉褋泻褍褞 褋褉械写褍. 袙 斜芯谢褜褕懈薪褋褌胁械 褉邪薪薪懈褏 锌芯写胁芯写薪褘褏 卸懈谢懈褖 芯褌褋褍褌褋褌胁芯胁邪谢懈 褉械谐械薪械褉邪褌懈胁薪褘械 褋懈褋褌械屑褘 写谢褟 胁芯蟹写褍褏邪, 胁芯写褘, 锌懈褖懈, 褝谢械泻褌褉懈褔械褋褌胁邪 懈 写褉褍谐懈褏 褉械褋褍褉褋芯胁. 袨写薪邪泻芯 胁 锌芯褋谢械写薪械械 胁褉械屑褟 薪械泻芯褌芯褉褘械 薪芯胁褘械 锌芯写胁芯写薪褘械 屑械褋褌邪 芯斜懈褌邪薪懈褟 锌芯蟹胁芯谢褟褞褌 写芯褋褌邪胁谢褟褌褜 褝褌懈 褉械褋褍褉褋褘 锌芯 褌褉褍斜邪屑 懈谢懈 谐械薪械褉懈褉芯胁邪褌褜 胁 褋褉械写械 芯斜懈褌邪薪懈褟, 邪 薪械 锌芯褋褌邪胁谢褟褌褜 懈褏 胁褉褍褔薪褍褞.

TEXT.English: A suburb is a residential area or a mixed use area, either existing as part of a city or urban area, or as a separate residential community within commuting distance of a city.
TEXT.French: Une banlieue est une zone r茅sidentielle ou 脿 usage mixte, soit faisant partie d'une ville ou zone urbaine, soit une communaut茅 r茅sidentielle distincte 脿 une distance raisonnable pour le trajet domicile-travail avec une ville.
TEXT.Russian: 袩褉懈谐芯褉芯写 - 芯斜褖械械 薪邪蟹胁邪薪懈械 薪邪褋械谢械薪薪芯泄 褌械褉褉懈褌芯褉懈懈 懈谢懈 薪邪褋械谢械薪薪芯谐芯 锌褍薪泻褌邪, 薪邪褏芯写褟褖械谐芯褋褟 蟹邪 邪写屑懈薪懈褋褌褉邪褌懈胁薪芯泄 谐褉邪薪懈褑械泄 谐芯褉芯写邪, 薪械锌芯写邪谢械泻褍 芯褌 薪械械. 袘芯谢褜褕懈薪褋褌胁芯 褋芯胁褉械屑械薪薪褘褏 锌褉懈谐芯褉芯写芯胁 褟胁谢褟褞褌褋褟 芦褋锌邪谢褜薪褘屑懈 褉邪泄芯薪邪屑懈禄 褋芯 屑薪芯卸械褋褌胁芯屑 卸懈谢褘褏 写芯屑芯胁. 校 屑薪芯谐懈褏 锌褉懈谐芯褉芯写芯胁 械褋褌褜 薪械泻芯褌芯褉邪褟 褋褌械锌械薪褜 锌芯谢懈褌懈褔械褋泻芯泄 邪胁褌芯薪芯屑懈懈 懈 胁 薪懈褏 斜芯谢械械 薪懈蟹泻邪褟 锌谢芯褌薪芯褋褌褜 薪邪褋械谢械薪懈褟, 褔械屑 胁芯 胁薪褍褌褉械薪薪懈褏 褉邪泄芯薪邪褏 谐芯褉芯写邪, 胁 芯褋薪芯胁薪芯屑 蟹邪 褋褔械褌 懈薪写懈胁懈写褍邪谢褜薪芯谐芯 卸懈谢褜褟. 袦械褏邪薪懈褔械褋泻懈泄 褌褉邪薪褋锌芯褉褌, 胁泻谢褞褔邪褟 邪胁褌芯屑芯斜懈谢懈 懈 胁褘褋芯泻芯褋泻芯褉芯褋褌薪褘械 锌芯械蟹写邪, 胁 XX 胁械泻械 锌芯蟹胁芯谢懈谢 锌褉懈谐芯褉芯写邪屑 褉邪蟹褉邪褋褌懈褋褜, 褔褌芯 写邪谢芯 褌芯谢褔芯泻 泻 斜褘褋褌褉芯屑褍 褍胁械谢懈褔械薪懈褞 斜谢懈蟹谢械卸邪褖懈褏 锌芯褋械谢械薪懈泄 褋 芯斜懈谢懈械屑 蟹械屑械谢褜薪褘褏 褌械褉褉懈褌芯褉懈泄, 锌褉懈谐芯写薪褘褏 写谢褟 蟹邪褋械谢械薪懈褟.
脩谩卯冒 帽矛卯毛没

TEXT.English: Tar is a black mixture of hydrocarbons and free carbon obtained from a wide variety of organic materials through destructive distillation. Tar can be produced from coal, wood, petroleum, or peat. Production and trade in pine-derived tar was a major contributor in the economies of Northern Europe and Colonial America. Its main use was in preserving wooden vessels against rot. The largest user was the Royal Navy. Demand for tar declined with the advent of iron and steel ships.
TEXT.French: Le goudron est un m茅lange noir d'hydrocarbures et de carbone libre obtenu par distillation destructrice d'une grande vari茅t茅 de mat茅riaux organiques. Le goudron peut 锚tre produit 脿 partir du charbon, du bois, du p茅trole ou de la tourbe. La production et le commerce du goudron de pin ont 茅t茅 un contributeur majeur pour les 茅conomies de l'Europe du Nord et de l'Am茅rique coloniale. Son usage principal 茅tait la conservation des navires en bois contre la pourriture. Le principal utilisateur fut la Royal Navy. La demande a diminu茅 avec l'apparition des navires en fer et en acier.
TEXT.Russian: 袚褍写褉芯薪 锌褉械写褋褌邪胁谢褟械褌 褋芯斜芯泄 褔械褉薪褍褞 褋屑械褋褜 褍谐谢械胁芯写芯褉芯写芯胁 懈 褋胁芯斜芯写薪芯谐芯 褍谐谢械褉芯写邪, 锌芯谢褍褔械薪薪褍褞 懈蟹 褋邪屑褘褏 褉邪蟹薪褘褏 芯褉谐邪薪懈褔械褋泻懈褏 屑邪褌械褉懈邪谢芯胁 锌褍褌械屑 写械褋褌褉褍泻褌懈胁薪芯泄 锌械褉械谐芯薪泻懈. 小屑芯谢褍 屑芯卸薪芯 锌褉芯懈蟹胁芯写懈褌褜 懈蟹 褍谐谢褟, 写褉械胁械褋懈薪褘, 薪械褎褌懈 懈谢懈 褌芯褉褎邪. 袩褉芯懈蟹胁芯写褋褌胁芯 懈 褌芯褉谐芯胁谢褟 褋屑芯谢芯泄, 锌芯谢褍褔械薪薪芯泄 懈蟹 褋芯褋薪褘, 胁薪芯褋褟褌 斜芯谢褜褕芯泄 胁泻谢邪写 胁 褝泻芯薪芯屑懈泻褍 褋褌褉邪薪 小械胁械褉薪芯泄 袝胁褉芯锌褘 懈 袣芯谢芯薪懈邪谢褜薪芯泄 袗屑械褉懈泻懈. 袝谐芯 芯褋薪芯胁薪芯械 锌褉懈屑械薪械薪懈械 蟹邪泻谢褞褔邪谢芯褋褜 胁 蟹邪褖懈褌械 写械褉械胁褟薪薪褘褏 褋芯褋褍写芯胁 芯褌 谐薪懈械薪懈褟. 小邪屑褘屑 泻褉褍锌薪褘屑 锌芯谢褜蟹芯胁邪褌械谢械屑 斜褘谢 袣芯褉芯谢械胁褋泻懈泄 褎谢芯褌. 小锌褉芯褋 薪邪 谐褍写褉芯薪 褋薪懈蟹懈谢褋褟 褋 锌芯褟胁谢械薪懈械屑 褔褍谐褍薪薪褘褏 懈 褋褌邪谢褜薪褘褏 褋褍写芯胁.

TEXT.English: Thatching is the craft of building a roof with dry vegetation such as straw, water reed, sedge (Cladium mariscus), rushes, or heather, layering the vegetation so as to shed water away from the inner roof. It is a very old roofing method and has been used in both tropical and temperate climates. Thatch is still employed by builders in developing countries, usually with low-cost, local vegetation. By contrast in some developed countries it is now the choice of affluent people who desire a rustic look for their home, would like a more ecologically friendly roof, or who have purchased an originally thatched abode.

TEXT.Russian: 袣褉芯胁械谢褜褖懈泻 - 褝褌芯 褉械屑械褋谢械薪薪懈泻, 懈蟹谐芯褌邪胁谢懈胁邪褞褖懈泄 泻褉褘褕懈 懈蟹 褋褍褏芯泄 褉邪褋褌懈褌械谢褜薪芯褋褌懈, 褌邪泻芯泄 泻邪泻 褋芯谢芯屑邪, 褌褉芯褋褌薪懈泻, 芯褋芯泻邪 (Cladium mariscus), 泻邪屑褘褕 懈谢懈 胁械褉械褋泻, 薪邪褋谢芯械薪懈械 褉邪褋褌懈褌械谢褜薪芯褋褌懈 褋谢芯褟屑懈 写谢褟 芯褌胁芯写邪 胁芯写褘 褋 胁薪褍褌褉械薪薪械泄 泻褉褘褕懈. 协褌芯 芯褔械薪褜 褋褌邪褉褘泄 屑械褌芯写 泻褉芯胁谢懈, 泻芯褌芯褉褘泄 懈褋锌芯谢褜蟹芯胁邪谢褋褟 泻邪泻 胁 褌褉芯锌懈褔械褋泻芯屑, 褌邪泻 懈 胁 褍屑械褉械薪薪芯屑 泻谢懈屑邪褌械. 小芯谢芯屑邪 锌芯-锌褉械卸薪械屑褍 懈褋锌芯谢褜蟹褍械褌褋褟 褋褌褉芯懈褌械谢褟屑懈 胁 褉邪蟹胁懈胁邪褞褖懈褏褋褟 褋褌褉邪薪邪褏, 泻邪泻 锌褉邪胁懈谢芯, 褋 薪械写芯褉芯谐芯泄 屑械褋褌薪芯泄 褉邪褋褌懈褌械谢褜薪芯褋褌褜褞. 袧邪锌褉芯褌懈胁, 胁 薪械泻芯褌芯褉褘褏 褉邪蟹胁懈褌褘褏 褋褌褉邪薪邪褏 褋械泄褔邪褋 褝褌芯 胁褘斜芯褉 斜芯谐邪褌褘褏 谢褞写械泄, 泻芯褌芯褉褘械 褏芯褌褟褌, 褔褌芯斜褘 懈褏 写芯屑 胁褘谐谢褟写械谢 胁 写械褉械胁械薪褋泻芯屑 褋褌懈谢械, 褏芯褌械谢 斜褘 斜芯谢械械 褝泻芯谢芯谐懈褔械褋泻懈 褔懈褋褌褍褞 泻褉褘褕褍 懈谢懈 泻芯褌芯褉褘械 锌褉懈芯斜褉械谢懈 懈蟹薪邪褔邪谢褜薪芯 褋芯谢芯屑械薪薪芯械 卸懈谢懈褖械.
脢卯铆貌冒卯毛眉 茂冒猫毛猫芒脿

TEXT.English: Tidal power or tidal energy is harnessed by converting energy from tides into useful forms of power, mainly electricity using various methods. Although not yet widely used, tidal energy has the potential for future electricity generation. Tides are more predictable than the wind and the sun. Among sources of renewable energy, tidal energy has traditionally suffered from relatively high cost and limited availability of sites with sufficiently high tidal ranges or flow velocities, thus constricting its total availability. However, many recent technological developments and improvements, both in design (e.g. dynamic tidal power, tidal lagoons) and turbine technology (e.g. new axial turbines, cross flow turbines), indicate that the total availability of tidal power may be much higher than previously assumed and that economic and environmental costs may be brought down to competitive levels.

TEXT.Russian: 脙卯冒卯盲卯锚

TEXT.English: A town is a human settlement larger than a village but smaller than a city. The size a settlement must be in order to be called a "town" varies considerably in different parts of the world, so that, for example, many American "small towns" seem to British people to be no more than villages, while many British "small towns" would qualify as cities in the United States.
TEXT.French: Une ville est un 茅tablissement humain plus grand qu'un village mais plus petit qu'une grande ville. La taille n茅cessaire pour qu'un 茅tablissement soit appel茅 芦 ville 禄 varie consid茅rablement selon les r茅gions du monde, de sorte que de nombreuses 芦 petites villes 禄 am茅ricaines paraissent 脿 beaucoup de Britanniques de simples villages, alors que nombre de petites villes britanniques seraient consid茅r茅es comme des villes aux 脡tats-Unis.
TEXT.Polish: Miasteczko (³ac. oppidum, niem. Stadtlein, Stadtchen, Markt, Flecken, jid. sztetl) - prawno-administracyjna jednostka osadnicza o charakterze przejœciowym miêdzy miastem a wsi¹, z charakterystycznym handlowo-przemys³owym (dawniej rzemieœlniczym) wyodrêbnieniem specjalnoœci i analogiczn¹ morfologi¹ oraz infrastruktur¹ co (ma³e) miasto.
TEXT.Russian: 袚芯褉芯写芯泻 - 褝褌芯 褔械谢芯胁械褔械褋泻芯械 锌芯褋械谢械薪懈械, 泻芯褌芯褉芯械 斜芯谢褜褕械 写械褉械胁薪懈, 薪芯 屑械薪褜褕械 谐芯褉芯写邪. 袪邪蟹屑械褉 锌芯褋械谢械薪懈褟, 褔褌芯斜褘 械谐芯 屑芯卸薪芯 斜褘谢芯 薪邪蟹胁邪褌褜 芦谐芯褉芯写泻芯屑禄, 蟹薪邪褔懈褌械谢褜薪芯 褉邪蟹谢懈褔邪械褌褋褟 胁 褉邪蟹薪褘褏 褔邪褋褌褟褏 屑懈褉邪, 褌邪泻 褔褌芯, 薪邪锌褉懈屑械褉, 屑薪芯谐懈械 邪屑械褉懈泻邪薪褋泻懈械 芦谐芯褉芯写泻懈禄 泻邪卸褍褌褋褟 斜褉懈褌邪薪褑邪屑 薪械 斜芯谢械械 褔械屑 写械褉械胁薪褟屑懈, 胁 褌芯 胁褉械屑褟 泻邪泻 屑薪芯谐懈械 斜褉懈褌邪薪褑褘 芦谐芯褉芯写泻懈禄 斜褍写褍褌 泻胁邪谢懈褎懈褑懈褉芯胁邪褌褜褋褟 泻邪泻 谐芯褉芯写邪 胁 小芯械写懈薪械薪薪褘褏 楔褌邪褌邪褏.
脛冒氓芒氓帽铆脿每 么氓冒矛脿

TEXT.English: A tree farm is a privately owned forest managed for timber production. The term, tree farm, also is used to refer to tree plantations, tree nurseries, and Christmas tree farms. Because tree farms are managed to enhance rapid growth, a tree farm tends to sequester carbon more quickly than an unmanaged forest, considering only the sequestration side of the equation and not the carbon release due to rot, fire, or harvest. The fact that managed woodlands tend to be younger and younger trees grow faster and die less contributes to this distinction.
TEXT.Russian: 袛褉械胁械褋薪邪褟 褎械褉屑邪 - 褝褌芯 褔邪褋褌薪褘泄 谢械褋芯锌懈褌芯屑薪懈泻, 胁 泻芯褌芯褉芯屑 胁械写械褌褋褟 锌褉芯懈蟹胁芯写褋褌胁芯 写褉械胁械褋懈薪褘. 孝械褉屑懈薪 芦写褉械胁械褋薪邪褟 褎械褉屑邪禄 褌邪泻卸械 懈褋锌芯谢褜蟹褍械褌褋褟 写谢褟 芯斜芯蟹薪邪褔械薪懈褟 锌谢邪薪褌邪褑懈泄 写械褉械胁褜械胁, 锌懈褌芯屑薪懈泻芯胁 写械褉械胁褜械胁 懈 褎械褉屑 锌芯 胁褘褉邪褖懈胁邪薪懈褞 褉芯卸写械褋褌胁械薪褋泻懈褏 械谢芯泻. 袩芯褋泻芯谢褜泻褍 写褉械胁芯褎械褉屑褘 褍锌褉邪胁谢褟褞褌褋褟 写谢褟 褍褋泻芯褉械薪懈褟 褉芯褋褌邪, 写褉械胁械褋薪褘械 褎械褉屑褘 懈屑械褞褌 褌械薪写械薪褑懈褞 褍谢邪胁谢懈胁邪褌褜 褍谐谢械褉芯写 斜褘褋褌褉械械, 褔械屑 薪械褍锌褉邪胁谢褟械屑褘械 谢械褋邪, 褍褔懈褌褘胁邪褟 褌芯谢褜泻芯 褔邪褋褌褜 褍褉邪胁薪械薪懈褟, 褋胁褟蟹邪薪薪褍褞 褋 褋械泻胁械褋褌褉邪褑懈械泄, 邪 薪械 胁褘斜褉芯褋褘 褍谐谢械褉芯写邪 懈蟹-蟹邪 谐薪懈械薪懈褟, 锌芯卸邪褉邪 懈谢懈 褍褉芯卸邪褟. 孝芯褌 褎邪泻褌, 褔褌芯 褍锌褉邪胁谢褟械屑褘械 谢械褋薪褘械 屑邪褋褋懈胁褘 芯斜褘褔薪芯 屑芯谢芯卸械, 邪 屑芯谢芯写褘械 写械褉械胁褜褟 褉邪褋褌褍褌 斜褘褋褌褉械械 懈 褉械卸械 褍屑懈褉邪褞褌, 褋锌芯褋芯斜褋褌胁褍械褌 褝褌芯屑褍 褉邪蟹谢懈褔懈褞.

TEXT.English: A village is a clustered human settlement or community, larger than a hamlet with the population ranging from a few hundred to a few thousands (sometimes tens of thousands), Though often located in rural areas, the term urban village is also applied to certain urban neighbourhoods, such as the West Village in Manhattan, New York City and the Saifi Village in Beirut, Lebanon, as well as Hampstead Village in the London conurbation. Villages are normally permanent, with fixed dwellings; however, transient villages can occur. Further, the dwellings of a village are fairly close to one another, not scattered broadly over the landscape, as a dispersed settlement.
TEXT.Polish: Wieœ (³ac. pagus, rus) - jednostka osadnicza o zwartej, skupionej lub rozproszonej zabudowie i istniej¹cych funkcjach rolniczych lub zwi¹zanych z nimi us³ugowych lub turystycznych, nieposiadaj¹ca praw miejskich lub statusumiasta (art. 2 ustawy z 29 sierpnia 2003 o urzêdowych nazwach miejscowoœci i obiektów fizjograficznych).
TEXT.Russian: 袛械褉械胁薪褟 锌褉械写褋褌邪胁谢褟械褌 褋芯斜芯泄 褋谐褉褍锌锌懈褉芯胁邪薪薪芯械 褔械谢芯胁械褔械褋泻芯械 锌芯褋械谢械薪懈械 懈谢懈 褋芯芯斜褖械褋褌胁芯, 斜芯谢褜褕械, 褔械屑 写械褉械胁薪褟, 褋 薪邪褋械谢械薪懈械屑 芯褌 薪械褋泻芯谢褜泻懈褏 褋芯褌械薪 写芯 薪械褋泻芯谢褜泻懈褏 褌褘褋褟褔 (懈薪芯谐写邪 写械褋褟褌泻芯胁 褌褘褋褟褔). 啸芯褌褟 褔邪褋褌芯 芯薪邪 褉邪褋锌芯谢芯卸械薪邪 胁 褋械谢褜褋泻芯泄 屑械褋褌薪芯褋褌懈, 褌械褉屑懈薪 谐芯褉芯写褋泻邪褟 写械褉械胁薪褟 褌邪泻卸械 锌褉懈屑械薪褟械褌褋褟 泻 芯锌褉械写械谢械薪薪褘屑 谐芯褉芯写褋泻懈屑 锌芯褋械谢械薪懈褟屑. 褉邪泄芯薪褘, 褌邪泻懈械 泻邪泻 校褝褋褌-袙懈谢谢懈写卸 薪邪 袦邪薪褏褝褌褌械薪械, 袧褜褞-袡芯褉泻械 懈 小邪泄褎懈-袙懈谢谢懈写卸 胁 袘械泄褉褍褌械, 袥懈胁邪薪, 邪 褌邪泻卸械 啸褝屑锌褋褌械写-袙懈谢谢懈写卸 胁 锌褉懈谐芯褉芯写械 袥芯薪写芯薪邪. 袛械褉械胁薪懈 芯斜褘褔薪芯 锌芯褋褌芯褟薪薪褘械, 褋 锌芯褋褌芯褟薪薪褘屑懈 卸懈谢懈褖邪屑懈; 芯写薪邪泻芯 胁褉械屑械薪薪褘械 写械褉械胁薪懈 屑芯谐褍褌 胁芯蟹薪懈泻邪褌褜. 袣褉芯屑械 褌芯谐芯, 写芯屑邪 胁 写械褉械胁薪械 褉邪褋锌芯谢芯卸械薪褘 写芯胁芯谢褜薪芯 斜谢懈蟹泻芯 写褉褍谐 泻 写褉褍谐褍, 邪 薪械 褉邪蟹斜褉芯褋邪薪褘 褕懈褉芯泻芯 锌芯 谢邪薪写褕邪褎褌褍, 泻邪泻 褉邪褋褋褉械写芯褌芯褔械薪薪芯械 锌芯褋械谢械薪懈械.

TEXT.English: A watermill is a structure that uses a water wheel or turbine to drive a mechanical process such as flour, lumber or textile production, or metal shaping (rolling, grinding or wire drawing).

TEXT.English: Water is a chemical substance with the chemical formula H2O. Its molecule contains one oxygen and two hydrogen atoms connected by covalent bonds. Water is a liquid at ambient conditions, but it often co-exists on Earth with its solid state, ice, and gaseous state (water vapor or steam). Water also exists in a liquid crystal state near hydrophilic surfaces.
TEXT.French: L'eau est une substance chimique de formule H2O. Sa mol茅cule contient un atome d'oxyg猫ne et deux atomes d'hydrog猫ne li茅s par covalence. L'eau est liquide 脿 temp茅rature ambiante, mais coexiste souvent sur Terre avec son 茅tat solide, la glace, et son 茅tat gazeux (vapeur d'eau ou vapeur). L'eau existe aussi sous forme de cristal liquide pr猫s des surfaces hydrophiles.
TEXT.Polish: Irygacja (nawadnianie, system irygacyjny) - jeden z systemów melioracji polegaj¹cy na dostarczaniu wody do gleby w celu zapewnienia odpowiednich warunków wegetacji roœlin uprawnych. Stosowana od staro¿ytnoœci (staro¿ytny Egipt, Mezopotamia, staro¿ytny Iran, Indie, Sri Lanka, Chiny, Peru). Wielowiekowy rozwój rolnictwa nawadnianego doprowadzi³ do wykszta³cenia siê odmiennych systemów nawadniania. Ró¿ni¹ siê one od siebie czynnoœciami nieznanymi innym systemom rolnictwa: sposobami poboru wód i ich doprowadzenia na miejsce przeznaczenia (na pole uprawne), sposobami rozprowadzania wód po polu, sposobami podnoszenia wód (gdy ich poziom jest ni¿szy ni¿ poziom pola, wyrównywaniem lub niwelacj¹ poziomu pól, jeœli s¹ one nierówne oraz ewentualnie sposobem odprowadzenia nadmiaru wód).
TEXT.Russian: 袙芯写邪 - 褝褌芯 褏懈屑懈褔械褋泻芯械 胁械褖械褋褌胁芯 褋 褏懈屑懈褔械褋泻芯泄 褎芯褉屑褍谢芯泄 H2O. 袝谐芯 屑芯谢械泻褍谢邪 褋芯写械褉卸懈褌 芯写懈薪 邪褌芯屑 泻懈褋谢芯褉芯写邪 懈 写胁邪 邪褌芯屑邪 胁芯写芯褉芯写邪, 褋胁褟蟹邪薪薪褘褏 泻芯胁邪谢械薪褌薪褘屑懈 褋胁褟蟹褟屑懈. 袙 褍褋谢芯胁懈褟褏 芯泻褉褍卸邪褞褖械泄 褋褉械写褘 胁芯写邪 褟胁谢褟械褌褋褟 卸懈写泻芯褋褌褜褞, 薪芯 薪邪 袟械屑谢械 芯薪邪 褔邪褋褌芯 褋芯褋褍褖械褋褌胁褍械褌 褋芯 褋胁芯懈屑 褌胁械褉写褘屑 褋芯褋褌芯褟薪懈械屑, 谢褜写芯屑 懈 谐邪蟹芯芯斜褉邪蟹薪褘屑 褋芯褋褌芯褟薪懈械屑 (胁芯写褟薪芯泄 锌邪褉 懈谢懈 锌邪褉). 袙芯写邪 褌邪泻卸械 褋褍褖械褋褌胁褍械褌 胁 卸懈写泻芯泻褉懈褋褌邪谢谢懈褔械褋泻芯屑 褋芯褋褌芯褟薪懈懈 褉褟写芯屑 褋 谐懈写褉芯褎懈谢褜薪褘屑懈 锌芯胁械褉褏薪芯褋褌褟屑懈.

TEXT.English: A wildlife refuge, also called a wildlife sanctuary, is a naturally occurring sanctuary, such as an island, that provides protection for species from hunting, predation or competition, it is a protected area, a geographic territory within which wildlife is protected. Such wildlife refuges are generally officially designated territories. It is created by government legislation, publicly or privately owned. Also, the Chernobyl nuclear accident site has accidentally become a wildlife refuge. It preserves the animals that are endangered or about to be extinct.
TEXT.Russian: 袟邪泻邪蟹薪懈泻, 褌邪泻卸械 薪邪蟹褘胁邪械屑芯械 蟹邪锌芯胁械写薪懈泻芯屑 写懈泻芯泄 锌褉懈褉芯写褘, 锌褉械写褋褌邪胁谢褟械褌 褋芯斜芯泄 锌褉懈褉芯写薪褘泄 锌邪褉泻, 褌邪泻芯泄 泻邪泻 芯褋褌褉芯胁, 泻芯褌芯褉褘泄 芯斜械褋锌械褔懈胁邪械褌 蟹邪褖懈褌褍 写懈泻懈褏 胁懈写芯胁 芯褌 芯褏芯褌褘, 褏懈褖薪懈褔械褋褌胁邪 懈谢懈 泻芯薪泻褍褉械薪褑懈懈. 协褌芯 芯褏褉邪薪褟械屑邪褟 褌械褉褉懈褌芯褉懈褟, 谐械芯谐褉邪褎懈褔械褋泻邪褟 褌械褉褉懈褌芯褉懈褟, 薪邪 泻芯褌芯褉芯泄 褋芯褏褉邪薪褟械褌褋褟 写懈泻邪褟 锌褉懈褉芯写邪. 孝邪泻懈械 蟹邪锌芯胁械写薪懈泻懈 芯斜褘褔薪芯 褟胁谢褟褞褌褋褟 芯褎懈褑懈邪谢褜薪芯 芯斜芯蟹薪邪褔械薪薪褘屑懈 褌械褉褉懈褌芯褉懈褟屑懈. 袨薪 褋芯蟹写邪械褌褋褟 褋芯谐谢邪褋薪芯 谐芯褋褍写邪褉褋褌胁械薪薪芯屑褍 蟹邪泻芯薪芯写邪褌械谢褜褋褌胁褍 胁 谐芯褋褍写邪褉褋褌胁械薪薪芯泄 懈谢懈 褔邪褋褌薪芯泄 褋芯斜褋褌胁械薪薪芯褋褌懈. 袣褉芯屑械 褌芯谐芯, 屑械褋褌芯 邪胁邪褉懈懈 薪邪 效械褉薪芯斜褘谢褜褋泻芯泄 袗协小 褋谢褍褔邪泄薪芯 褋褌邪谢芯 蟹邪锌芯胁械写薪懈泻芯屑 写懈泻芯泄 锌褉懈褉芯写褘. 袨薪 褋芯褏褉邪薪褟械褌 卸懈胁芯褌薪褘褏, 薪邪褏芯写褟褖懈褏褋褟 锌芯写 褍谐褉芯蟹芯泄 懈褋褔械蟹薪芯胁械薪懈褟 懈谢懈 薪邪褏芯写褟褖懈褏褋褟 薪邪 谐褉邪薪懈 懈褋褔械蟹薪芯胁械薪懈褟.

TEXT.English: A windmill is a machine which converts the energy of wind into rotational motion by means of adjustable vanes called sails or blades. The main use was originally for a grinding mill powered by the wind, reducing a solid or coarse substance into pulp or minute grains, by crushing, grinding, or pressing. Windmills have also been used to power sawmills and other industrial processes and as windpumps for obtaining fresh water from underground or for drainage of land.
TEXT.French: Un moulin 脿 vent est une machine qui convertit l'茅nergie du vent en mouvement rotatif au moyen d'ailerons r茅glables appel茅s voiles ou pales. L'usage principal 茅tait 脿 l'origine un moulin 脿 meule actionn茅 par le vent, r茅duisant une substance solide ou grossi猫re en pulpe ou en grains fins, par 茅crasement, broyage ou pressage. Les moulins 脿 vent ont aussi 茅t茅 utilis茅s pour alimenter des scieries, d'autres processus industriels, ou comme pompes 脿 vent pour extraire de l'eau douce souterraine ou drainer des terrains.

Jest najstarszym silnikiem wiatrowym - przetwarza energiê wiatru na energiê kinetyczn¹ wruchu obrotowym. Jest poprzednikiem turbiny wiatrowej, któr¹ czasami równie¿ nazywa siê wiatrakiem.
TEXT.Russian: * 脗氓貌冒每铆脿每 矛氓毛眉铆猫枚脿: 芒帽氓 枚猫芒猫毛猫莽脿枚猫猫脗氓貌冒每铆脿每 矛氓毛眉铆猫枚脿 - 矛脿酶猫铆脿, 锚卯貌卯冒脿每 茂冒氓卯谩冒脿莽贸氓貌 媒铆氓冒茫猫镁 芒氓貌冒脿 芒卯 芒冒脿霉脿貌氓毛眉铆贸镁 媒铆氓冒茫猫镁 茂卯帽冒氓盲帽貌芒卯矛 毛卯茂脿帽貌氓茅, 铆脿莽没芒脿氓矛没玫 锚冒没毛眉每矛猫.

TEXT.English: A winery is a building or property that produces wine, or a business involved in wine production, such as a wine company. Some wine companies own many wineries. Besides winemaking equipment, larger wineries may also feature warehouses, bottling lines, laboratories, and large expanses of tanks known as tank farms. The oldest winery in the world, dating back 6,000 years, is located in the Areni region of Armenia, which is still a winemaking region today.
TEXT.French: Une maison de vinification est un b芒timent ou une propri茅t茅 produisant du vin, ou une entreprise impliqu茅e dans la production viticole, telle une soci茅t茅 de vins. Certaines compagnies poss猫dent plusieurs domaines viticoles. Outre les 茅quipements vinicoles, les plus grandes maisons disposent aussi d'entrep么ts, lignes d'embouteillage, laboratoires, et vastes zones de cuves dites chais. La plus ancienne maison viticole, vieille de 6 000 ans, est situ茅e dans la r茅gion d'Areni en Arm茅nie, encore r茅put茅e pour la vinification aujourd'hui.
TEXT.Russian: * 脗猫铆卯盲氓毛眉铆每: 芒帽氓 枚猫芒猫毛猫莽脿枚猫猫脗猫铆卯盲氓毛眉铆每 - 莽盲脿铆猫氓 猫毛猫 猫矛氓铆猫氓, 锚卯貌卯冒卯氓 茂冒卯猫莽芒卯盲猫貌 芒猫铆卯, 猫毛猫 谩猫莽铆氓帽, 芒卯芒毛氓梅氓铆铆没茅 芒 茂冒卯猫莽芒卯盲帽貌芒卯 芒猫铆脿, 貌猫茂脿 芒猫铆铆卯茅 锚卯矛茂脿铆猫猫. 脥氓锚卯貌卯冒没氓 芒猫铆铆没氓 锚卯矛茂脿铆猫猫 猫矛氓镁貌 矛铆卯茫卯 芒猫铆铆没玫 莽脿芒卯盲卯芒. 脧卯矛猫矛卯 芒猫铆卯盲氓毛眉梅氓帽锚卯茫卯 卯谩卯冒贸盲卯芒脿铆猫每, 谩卯毛眉酶猫氓 芒猫铆铆没氓 莽脿芒卯盲没 矛卯茫贸貌 貌脿锚忙氓 卯貌毛猫梅脿貌眉帽每 帽锚毛脿盲脿矛猫, 毛猫铆猫每矛猫 谩贸貌没毛卯梅铆卯茫卯 冒卯莽毛猫芒脿, 毛脿谩卯冒脿貌卯冒猫每矛猫, 猫 谩卯毛眉酶猫矛猫 茂冒卯貌每忙氓铆猫每矛猫 冒氓莽氓冒芒贸脿冒卯芒, 猫莽芒氓帽貌铆没玫 锚脿锚 么氓冒矛没 冒氓莽氓冒芒贸脿冒卯芒. 脩脿矛没茅 帽貌脿冒没茅 芒猫铆铆没茅 莽脿芒卯盲 芒 矛猫冒氓, 铆脿茅盲氓铆铆没茅 盲卯 铆脿帽貌卯每霉氓茫卯 芒冒氓矛氓铆猫 - 6 000-毛氓貌铆猫茅 芒猫铆铆没茅 莽脿芒卯盲 芒 卯谩毛脿帽貌猫 脌冒铆猫 脌冒矛氓铆猫猫, 锚卯貌卯冒脿每 帽氓茫卯盲铆每 芒帽氓 氓霉氓 每芒毛每氓貌帽每 芒猫铆卯盲氓毛眉梅氓帽锚卯茅 卯谩毛脿帽貌眉镁. - Wikipedia

TEXT.English: A workshop is a room or building which provides both the space and tools (or machinery) needed for the manufacture or repair of manufactured goods. Before industrialization, workshops, aside from larger manufactories, were the primary sites of production.
TEXT.French: Un atelier est une salle ou b芒timent fournissant espace et outils (ou machines) n茅cessaires 脿 la fabrication ou r茅paration de biens manufactur茅s. Avant l'industrialisation, les ateliers, 脿 l'exclusion des grandes manufactures, 茅taient les principaux lieux de production.
TEXT.Russian: * 脤脿帽貌氓冒帽锚脿每: 芒帽氓 枚猫芒猫毛猫莽脿枚猫猫脗卯 芒冒氓矛每 "猫铆盲贸帽貌冒猫脿毛眉铆卯茅 媒冒没", 矛脿帽貌氓冒帽锚脿每 矛卯忙氓貌 谩没貌眉 莽脿毛卯矛 猫毛猫 莽盲脿铆猫氓矛, 锚卯貌卯冒卯氓 卯谩氓帽茂氓梅猫芒脿氓貌 猫 卯谩毛脿帽貌眉 猫 猫铆帽貌冒贸矛氓铆貌没 (猫毛猫 矛脿酶猫铆没), 锚卯貌卯冒没氓 矛卯茫贸貌 茂卯貌冒氓谩卯芒脿貌眉帽每 盲毛每 猫莽茫卯貌卯芒毛氓铆猫每 猫毛猫 冒氓矛卯铆貌脿 茂冒卯矛没酶毛氓铆铆没玫 貌卯芒脿冒卯芒.
